Peter – This July, we’re celebrating **GOTV Infrastructure Month** with a full lineup of GOTV trainings. We are helping campaigns and local organizations learn everything they need to know about GOTV, field operations, voter persuasion, and _so much more._ [_Check out the entire list of July’s live trainings_](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vdDJKbmJ1U1F6SC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9) _and RSVP for the top 3 GOTV trainings below to lay the groundwork for a winning campaign!_ **⇨ Get started with**[** _What is Get Out the Vote (GOTV)?_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vNXhuVGUyS1M5Ti9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)**on Wednesday, July 14 at 1pm ET.** Look, the end of the campaign is in sight — but you still need to plan for GOTV! Let our experts walk you through what GOTV is, when to do it, and how to do it well. [**_RSVP here for next Wednesday’s training and make sure you know how to plan for GOTV!_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vdkpVS3ZlR0hjcy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vTHBlU3BOZnhNMC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

**⇨ Then, RSVP for**[** _How to Develop your GOTV Universe and Script_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vUVlnYlJIYVNuYy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)**on Tuesday, July 20 at 1pm ET.**
This training will teach you how to target specific groups of voters to maximize your campaign’s reach in the home stretch.
**If you want to learn how to leave it all out in the field. This training is a**** _must!_**
[**_Click here to RSVP for this training on Tuesday, July 20, and set your campaign up for success!_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vOEJROEVvdzhPNi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

**⇨ And don’t miss**[** _How Your Local Democratic Party Can Prepare for GOTV_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vSURTa3NvdEFLUC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)**on Thursday, July 29 at 1pm ET!**
GOTV can be exhausting — we know that.
Just like friends and families join marathoners in their last leg, make sure you know how to support GOTV efforts in your community.
[**_RSVP for this important training on Thursday, July 29!_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vRmIxQnNJc2k3Ty9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vOU5CM0ZKVTBIWS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

**⇨ Finally, save your spot at**[** _Trainer Talks: Setting Up Successful GOTV Infrastructure_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vR3Qyd1pyMVVwTi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)**on Friday, July 30 at 1 pm ET.**
To cap off GOTV Infrastructure Month, we’re bringing in a panel of campaign experts to discuss how _you_ can build the GOTV infrastructure your community or campaign needs to succeed.
[**With the right preparations, you can beat the chaos of GOTV. So why not kick off your GOTV preparations at Friday’s special training?****_RSVP now!_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vY1MyYzRBeURtUy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoidGhjcXZ4OHN4MGRwcWY4bTNxc3kiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vTFZvWnBuOWJyNy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA3MjFfR09UVl9JbmZyYVx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNkN1uhCAQhZ8G7zCAP9ALL7q73dcwOKDSABLEbnz7orGbJhNIzjCHM5_qGAgGUJiOEUYJJ4IQxmlb0pK2dSuaj-rr_rwJyh6oJi_jS7V4adV3ipsLJSyumDsiqQbQwGvOhg_aQkM45Y2QTLFBgChsN6cUVlR9IvbMtWrYoi6l09GAHE1cU1isgf0wzH2wAVstFZ60xzkUx-OAqqd0y-YTqh4NQazdkuudVmZzWdFOGtvP46WvyxZBZ91B72WuSwfpgjSTz51rX94PZsJJw4zTHqVPKw46mWQW3_9ftV_lj74C_5ktPukzz3sCwh7X_F0ROxVexlqztjyDm454J60cwJpx7xC_Ica2zah8nWAOVFAJWmMxNgLXFQAWNSVYZJp0BKjbqjkes3s-0x70e_IyLU8Kh8ofv3aYlyI)

Friend,

Today, my team and I announced our plan to **Take On Big Tech.** **We are SUING the big tech tyrants: Facebook, Twitter & Google.**

This lawsuit is just the beginning and just one part of a bigger fight. _**This suit isn 't the whole battle: it's an opening shot.**_

We'll fight in the courts, we'll fight in the legislatures, and we'll fight at the ballot boxes until the American people have their rights and sovereignty restored.

[MORE INFORMATION HERE >>](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNkN1uhCAQhZ8G7zCAP9ALL7q73dcwOKDSABLEbnz7orGbJhNIzjCHM5_qGAgGUJiOEUYJJ4IQxmlb0pK2dSuaj-rr_rwJyh6oJi_jS7V4adV3ipsLJSyumDsiqQbQwGvOhg_aQkM45Y2QTLFBgChsN6cUVlR9IvbMtWrYoi6l09GAHE1cU1isgf0wzH2wAVstFZ60xzkUx-OAqqd0y-YTqh4NQazdkuudVmZzWdFOGtvP46WvyxZBZ91B72WuSwfpgjSTz51rX94PZsJJw4zTHqVPKw46mWQW3_9ftV_lj74C_5ktPukzz3sCwh7X_F0ROxVexlqztjyDm454J60cwJpx7xC_Ica2zah8nWAOVFAJWmMxNgLXFQAWNSVYZJp0BKjbqjkes3s-0x70e_IyLU8Kh8ofv3aYlyI)

**[Follow this personalized link to learn more about YOUR PRESIDENT'S lawsuit against Facebook, Twitter, and Google or for information about becoming a member of the class >>](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNkN1uhCAQhZ8G7zCAP9ALL7q73dcwOKDSABLEbnz7orGbJhNIzjCHM5_qGAgGUJiOEUYJJ4IQxmlb0pK2dSuaj-rr_rwJyh6oJi_jS7V4adV3ipsLJSyumDsiqQbQwGvOhg_aQkM45Y2QTLFBgChsN6cUVlR9IvbMtWrYoi6l09GAHE1cU1isgf0wzH2wAVstFZ60xzkUx-OAqqd0y-YTqh4NQazdkuudVmZzWdFOGtvP46WvyxZBZ91B72WuSwfpgjSTz51rX94PZsJJw4zTHqVPKw46mWQW3_9ftV_lj74C_5ktPukzz3sCwh7X_F0ROxVexlqztjyDm454J60cwJpx7xC_Ica2zah8nWAOVFAJWmMxNgLXFQAWNSVYZJp0BKjbqjkes3s-0x70e_IyLU8Kh8ofv3aYlyI)**

**[Follow this personalized link to learn more or for information about becoming a member of the class.](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNkN1uhCAQhZ8G7zCAP9ALL7q73dcwOKDSABLEbnz7orGbJhNIzjCHM5_qGAgGUJiOEUYJJ4IQxmlb0pK2dSuaj-rr_rwJyh6oJi_jS7V4adV3ipsLJSyumDsiqQbQwGvOhg_aQkM45Y2QTLFBgChsN6cUVlR9IvbMtWrYoi6l09GAHE1cU1isgf0wzH2wAVstFZ60xzkUx-OAqqd0y-YTqh4NQazdkuudVmZzWdFOGtvP46WvyxZBZ91B72WuSwfpgjSTz51rX94PZsJJw4zTHqVPKw46mWQW3_9ftV_lj74C_5ktPukzz3sCwh7X_F0ROxVexlqztjyDm454J60cwJpx7xC_Ica2zah8nWAOVFAJWmMxNgLXFQAWNSVYZJp0BKjbqjkes3s-0x70e_IyLU8Kh8ofv3aYlyI)**

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Democrats Reap What They Sow
body:
it’s Republicans who want to defund police?
it's Republicans who want to defund police? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Democrats Reap What They Sow](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-j/)
Democrats have been pushing "defund the police" for the last year or so. Now they're trying to say "no, it's actually Republicans who want to defund police." Will it work? Read about the battle in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Critical Race Theory](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-d/)
America is the land of the free and the home of the brave, right? Well, not everyone thinks so. Read about "critical race theory" in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Dems Are Doing a Great Deal of Damage to Our Country](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Democrats currently control the House, the Senate, and the White House. And they're doing a lot of damage with that power. It's past time we fight back. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Mainstream Press Gets it Wrong Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlklhte-kujkulhluu-n/)
Remember when the mainstream press blamed Donald Trump for tear-gassing protesters to do a photo op? Well he didn't. Read about it in this week's blog. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: disastrous Supreme Court ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend - in the wake of the Supreme's Court's disastrous ruling to further decimate the Voting Rights Act, I wanted to make sure you saw my new petition.
---
**Ending the Republicans ' death grip and misuse of the filibuster has never been more essential. As demonstrated by the Court's deeply flawed recent ruling, there is no other hope for protecting this most basic constitutional right. So, if you're with me in the fight to defend our democracy, I'm counting on you to add your name. **
Thousands of concerned citizens have already signed on - but right now, we're still falling _just short_ of our critical signature goal. Now is _not_ the time to shy away from speaking out in defense of democracy, so I'm asking directly: **Can you please take a moment now to add your name and urge the Senate to end the filibuster and protect voting rights? Your voice is essential in defending our democracy from extremist Republican attacks.**
Here's the best link to sign the petition: **[https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-scotusvotingrights](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-scotusvotingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1050-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0721voting%3Fcode%3Djtk1050-su-nd)**.
Thank you,

Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Thu, Jul 1, 2021
Subject: RE: today's disastrous Supreme Court ruling

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BM%2F3GRABUy089eV9tDAdwq6qVnkb8alA&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
The Supreme Court just issued a ruling on a major voting rights case - and grievously, as expected, the Court's right-wing majority ruled to further gut the Voting Rights Act and uphold state laws that make it more difficult to vote.
As Justice Kagan notes in her incisive dissent, this is a "tragic" decision - tragic in that "the Court has (yet again) rewritten - in order to weaken - a statute that stands as a monument to America's greatness, and protects against its basest impulses."
The Voting Rights Act (VRA) was designed to prevent racial discrimination in voting laws and ensure all Americans can participate in our democracy. Today's disastrous ruling doesn't just critically weaken the VRA - it gives a green light to Republican-led state legislatures across the country to continue their assault on voting rights and pass even more legislation making it harder to vote.
In the wake of today's disastrous ruling, it's clearer than ever that Congress must pass sweeping new legislation to strengthen voting rights. But the only way we can succeed is by eliminating the filibuster so that these bills can pass with a simple-majority vote - and it will take nothing short of a groundswell of grassroots action to make that happen.
Friend, supporters like you have stepped up many times before. You've urged the Senate to pass the For the People Act to protect voting rights. You've spoken out against the filibuster. But moments like this demand we keep speaking out until our democracy is protected.
**In the wake of this adverse ruling, I 'm counting on 1,000 members of this grassroots team to sign my new petition urging the Senate to abolish the filibuster and restore the VRA. Can I count on you to add your name before our midnight deadline?**
**[Sign on now to tell the Senate to end the filibuster to protect voting rights and our democracy!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-scotusvotingrights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1050-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0721voting%3Fcode%3Djtk1050-su-nd)**
You have my word that I will fight my absolute hardest to ensure the filibuster is a thing of the past. But this is a fight that can only be won together - with unprecedented grassroots action. I appreciate you doing your part.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1050-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gp7r4oX0ZN%2FMJ76NMTf66K6qVnkb8alA&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Action Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Breaking: Trump suing FB to overturn his ban
body:
Tell Facebook not to cave!
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [***BREAKING: TRUMP SUES FACEBOOK TO OVERTURN BAN; TELL FB "DON'T CAVE!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89fdc0fb-7f97-4473-813e-26d2376a6e64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a3dbd61-ef2a-473b-b0d1-7281ab599bfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After repeatedly violating Facebook’s rules, Donald Trump was banned from FB earlier this year for a period of at least 2 years. **[But TODAY Trump announced he is ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2c9643e-4509-4135-b5b7-0a82894eae8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[suing Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef1688cc-4c06-451c-9305-8da3fcf30301/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), arguing that his First Amendment rights are being violated, because Facebook is a branch of the government. ** Because he apparently has never read the Constitution. His arguments may be absurd, but the threat, cost, and pain to Facebook of a lawsuit is real, and FB will be under great pressure to reverse the ban. We need to make sure they stand strong.

[**Sign this new petition & tell Facebook: “Don’t cave to Trump’s lawsuit — keep the ban!”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T001f4876-1a7a-4e82-a566-358958ba835a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | Members of the House select committee to investigate the January 6 insurrection have been announced; eight picks come from Nancy Pelosi and five from Kevin McCarthy. Pelosi, understandably, nominated only members that understand the full extent of the damage that that dark day had on our democracy. McCarthy, on the other hand, is rumored to be considering SEVERAL members of Congress who may have played an **intimate** role in the planning and execution of that unprecedented attack on the cornerstone of our democracy. AOC rightfully called McCarthy out, saying these Republicans can't “be a part of the investigation” into the January 6 terrorist attack. **Here at When Democrats Turn Out, we're taking this a step further, and we want to know if you agree:** **Do you think Republicans should have to answer questions about their culpability in the January 6 insurrection?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32064234/294596399/-590456323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4Yjg5ODlhLWYwZGYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1ho3dJ2oSfw1r6fvgfZb2pY9CxjKSyJ6e7a7Rwd05aI=&emci=88d25957-6cdf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=68b8989a-f0df-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32064236/294596400/-590456323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4Yjg5ODlhLWYwZGYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1ho3dJ2oSfw1r6fvgfZb2pY9CxjKSyJ6e7a7Rwd05aI=&emci=88d25957-6cdf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=68b8989a-f0df-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

Thank you for your response. If we are to move forward after that dark day in January, then we must get to the bottom of Republican involvement in the insurrection.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

P.S. It's true that right now Democrats are projected to lose the House in 2022. But that's only because our candidates don't have the resources they need to make their case to the voters. With your help, we can flip those odds. Will you give $25 TODAY to help our Democrats beat the projections? AOC rightfully called McCarthy out, saying these Republicans can't “be a part of the investigation” into the January 6 terrorist attack. Here at When Democrats Turn Out, we're taking this a step further, and we want to know if you agree: Do you think Republicans should have to answer questions about their culpability in the January 6 insurrection? | | | ---|---|--- Thank you for your response. If we are to move forward after that dark day in January, then we must get to the bottom of Republican involvement in the insurrection. \- When Democrats Turn Out P.S. It's true that right now Democrats are projected to lose the House in 2022. But that's only because our candidates don't have the resources they need to make their case to the voters. name: PACT
subject: WOW: Nation’s largest teachers union endorses Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
"They're not trying to educate; they're trying to indoctrinate." \- Ron DeSantis

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57893379:6Znah3lJN:m:1:3253819041:D4854FFD8E66CF0169E9C0E7D962B907:r)
---
Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57893379:6Znah3lJN:m:1:3253819041:D4854FFD8E66CF0169E9C0E7D962B907:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57893379:6Znah3lJN:m:1:3253819041:D4854FFD8E66CF0169E9C0E7D962B907:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57893379:6Znah3lJN:m:1:3253819041:D4854FFD8E66CF0169E9C0E7D962B907:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us DEFEAT Critical Race Theory> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57893379:6Znah3lJN:m:1:3253819041:D4854FFD8E66CF0169E9C0E7D962B907:r)**

subject: Here’s the other piece
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Yesterday, Stefanie touched base with you about our June fundraising total. We’re incredibly excited: contributions of $100 or fewer made up 92% of our total.

With over 4,500 individual donations to our campaign in June, it’s clear this is a grassroots movement built by supporters like you.

But here’s the bad news: DeSantis raised close to $3 million, and we need to keep pace.

If you’re all in on stopping Ron DeSantis and breaking Florida’s rigged system, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ejunefrnumbersnf?refcode=thursday]

DeSantis has Republican mega-donors from across the country on his side. They want him to run for President in 2024, so they’re bankrolling his reelection campaign.

Our movement is stronger because this campaign wasn’t built by special interests. It was built by supporters like you who want to try something new and put an end to Ron DeSantis’ cruel authoritarianism.

But to win this race, we need your continued support to keep pace with DeSantis’ fundraising and fight back against the onslaught of Republican attacks. If you’re all in with Nikki, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ejunefrnumbersnf?refcode=thursday]

We have the momentum in this race because of grassroots supporters like you. Thanks for everything you’re doing to support our campaign and break Florida’s system.

—Team Nikki

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: A Republican senator just called for *another* audit of PA’s 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Republicans can't go a single day without finding new ways to push their cockamamie conspiracy theories
#

Friend,
Republicans can't go a single day without finding new ways to push their cockamamie conspiracy theories.
A Pennsylvania Republican State Senator just announced a new effort to hold a "forensic audit" of Pennsylvania's 2020 election.
I am running out of ways to say this, so I’ll just say it again: Pennsylvania held a fair and free election in 2020 that led to the swearing-in of President Biden.
**This is exactly why I outlined my eight-point agenda to save our democracy this week — and it's why I'm going to fight every day to take this plan to the United States Senate.**
[If you want to fight back against the GOP's lies and voter suppression, you help me take my plan to the Senate by pitching in $3 to our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32072695/294618382/-353695395?refcode2=1c18802f-fddf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210708-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzE4ODAyZi1mZGRmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4V-_IJ_M1Hz_PBZBhviBKUyhO0pujyBvx6VazJ4ZTY=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32072696/294618383/-353695395?refcode2=1c18802f-fddf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210708-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzE4ODAyZi1mZGRmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4V-_IJ_M1Hz_PBZBhviBKUyhO0pujyBvx6VazJ4ZTY=)**
I wish Republicans would take a day off from spreading garbage and lies, but the reality is they cannot handle the truth of their defeat.
That's why they keep pushing the Big Lie — passing restrictive voter suppression bills and forcing these sham audits.
Just six months ago, we saw the disastrous effects of these kinds of lies and misinformation on our democracy, with the violent insurrection on our nation's Capitol.
Our democracy is fragile, and it needs us to fight for it now more than ever. We must not let the GOP continue to destroy the very foundation of our country.
**If you're with me in this fight, will you take action today to help me take my eight-point democracy agenda to the U.S. Senate?**
[Please pitch in $3 to support our fight to make our democracy accessible to every working person in Pennsylvania and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32072697/294618384/-353695395?refcode2=1c18802f-fddf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210708-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzE4ODAyZi1mZGRmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4V-_IJ_M1Hz_PBZBhviBKUyhO0pujyBvx6VazJ4ZTY=)
Thanks so much for standing with me,
Malcolm

name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: We need your help celebrating Tennessee’s 225th birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
Happy Birthday Tennessee, let's flip some House seats.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32073520/294622409/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QwZGU4OC1mZWRmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rck84kEm8nv5HEC8fa9E2xQOw57rIZgvBZiN7t6Oiwk=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32073521/294622410/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QwZGU4OC1mZWRmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rck84kEm8nv5HEC8fa9E2xQOw57rIZgvBZiN7t6Oiwk=)
Dear Friend,

225 years ago our great state was granted statehood and we’ve spent the years since perfecting our state into one that can live up to its promise. Tennessee, known as the Volunteer State, was once applauded for its efforts to defend the American Constitution and the freedom it promises for our working families. Unfortunately though, GOP lawmakers gained a super majority in Tennessee’s General Assembly and have been restricting our freedoms ever since. Rural hospitals are closing, our infrastructure is crumbling, schools cannot afford to hire teachers, and gun violence is at an all time high. It’s time we end this and restore Tennessee’s hope.
Today, we’re launching our small dollar donor program to fund the crucial work to flip seats in the 2022 election. In honor of Tennessee’s 225th birthday, we’re asking 225 people to commit to being a recurring donor for the entirety of this election cycle. **[$5, $10, $25, $100, every cent counts and goes toward helping Democrats win seats in Tennessee's House of Representatives. Will you join us by making a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32073522/294622411/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2QwZGU4OC1mZWRmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rck84kEm8nv5HEC8fa9E2xQOw57rIZgvBZiN7t6Oiwk=)**

Together and only together can we do this.
Thank you,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

| July 2021 Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends,
As the summer marks a time for enjoyment and travel, we must note that the summer heat also poses dangers for many low-income seniors who must combat the summer heat without adequate cooling aids and air conditioning.
We would like to extend our gratitude to all those who have participated in our recent phone banking events to check on our senior citizens who are without air conditioning or who may be in need of food, water, home repair, or other critical items. We have managed to connect those seniors to services needed due to these phone banking events.
Please join us on July 17th from 9:30 am to 11:00 am for our next Texas Senior Wellness Check Phone Bank.
Please sign up using this link to volunteer!

---
|

Peter,
We need to get rid of Bill Lee and Tennesseans agree. Across the state we are having conversation after conversation with real people and they aren’t happy. Lee doesn’t feel that Tennesseeans deserve the resources at his disposal but he’s committed to squandering our tax dollars on tourists' vacations. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I'm sending you this quick message right before I give one of my biggest speeches this year, Peter. 📩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I don't have much time left so I'll get straight to the point: My father made it his NUMBER ONE priority to win back the Conservative Majority that the American People deserve. I take that VERY seriously.
Hey, Peter -- this is Donald Trump Jr.
I'm sending you this quick message right before I give one of my biggest speeches this year.
I don't have much time left so I'll get straight to the point: My father made it his NUMBER ONE priority to win back the Conservative Majority that the American People deserve. **I take that VERY seriously.**
[**If every American Patriot on this list _\-- including you --_ pitches in just seven dollars, we will hit our fundraising goal before I take the stage and begin my speech.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57895855:JuEs33lNl:m:1:3253819041:A20F4E61DBE43A07091354C5FE0704A5:r)

Your support for our America first movement has been nothing short of inspiring. Believe me, I've noticed.
**Now I'm personally asking you to help make my father SO proud.**
Last line edit: I'm about to walk on stage. [**Can you pitch in a few bucks before then?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57895855:JuEs33lNl:m:1:3253819041:A20F4E61DBE43A07091354C5FE0704A5:r)
For America,

body:
We want to know where our voters stand. Survey enclosed. | | | |
---
| | | Friend,

We are reaching out to you today to find out **_what issues are important to you and your family._**
---
| Ever since Congressman LaTurner was sworn in, he’s been fighting for our conservative values in Washington DC. We want to make sure Jake is fighting for the things you care most about. **You can let us know by clicking[this link](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5dad60cb38&e=1050d051da) and completing this very quick survey. **
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=fdc57ee03d&e=1050d051da)
---
| The Democrats are doing everything they can to ram through their radical policies, but Jake LaTurner and the Republicans are standing up to them at every turn.

Congressman LaTurner will always work in the best interests of Kansas' Second District, so please let us know if there is anything more we can be doing to take the fight to Washington.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---

name: Lisa Scheller for Congress
subject: Farmers for Scheller Coalition Announced!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc
body:
Today, Republican Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller announces Farmers for Scheller Coalition. Contact: Pierce Frauenheim Pierce@schellerforcongress.com For immediate release: **Lisa Scheller for Congress Announces First Coalition, Farmers for Scheller ** **Allentown** : Today, Lisa Scheller for Congress announced the formation of the first coalition for the 2022 campaign. "I am so happy to launch our first coalition, Farmers for Scheller." Said Republican Congressional candidate Lisa Scheller. "The 7th Congressional District includes over 450 farms that are woven into our way of life, and I vow to be an ally to those farmers who, in the past have been let down by our leaders in Washington." "Ever since I met Lisa Scheller, she demonstrated sincere interest in learning what farming is all about which is why I am so happy to be leading the Farmers for Scheller coalition during her run for Congress in 2022", said Arland Schantz, chair of Farmers for Scheller who has been the owner and operator of Evergreen Farm, a hay, field crop, and evergreen tree farm since 1979. He has a seventh generation descendant to live on and operate the family farm. "Lisa's interest and seriousness about being a voice for farmers is genuine," added Schantz. "I’m inclined to trust that Lisa holds a sincere resolve to upholding the well being of farmers, by working closely with farmers and actively addressing their needs. I am excited to be a part of Farmers for Scheller and work to make farming a cornerstone of Lisa's campaign and to win in 2022!" ### [Sign up to join Farmers for Scheller!](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=3d8b2d738acf40869bbcf1d65afc3ce4&_e=yfMvTt8xAFyzizYWZ_fcNZwyKKvTSf9cfBXb-sOEd-uR_fbpvOJ4aEMf5YLdUxBnXeIlhQ9e6EROYKmuVGZvPh8NRGUDuP9CieWYGUNAZ6c19T51j9OxAKTQNWzBTIxOWIfGWxOnw3u8m-b66L1Z4rNHlar3MCgBwKu3f7fdY3YT78gh2Le8ZlbECQs4b7VjoX0AIlDrpwsAmOUhe6JaZPStMPt8eYdQOwGP9csPkxbCK0Bl1YtOTOdN5gJSYUlLmr6b4g-PKN7Hbtykf1ETRsamhqF3V16k2n4PFB9ZW3k%3D) | | [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=3d8b2d738acf40869bbcf1d65afc3ce4&_e=yfMvTt8xAFyzizYWZ_fcNaRsHWuEft-3QfWT2Mi9zSkjJUf5NyWoRCQ9rsNboWgNsDaW2Yi3n_Wzd4zHCZ6TabymQiH42TxoLKELdWODF0dySMMtXKx-Mszos2PrwEZWMv-C9MSYnKZwxv2BSE5Od1N_ut7CS-dvPTVzqAEh6qop8qTUpz-RSiBv4qJosX3dpoB8xmDsEMYU-J_I-_TlVYa3zWzxo1pPdt6pzataU9XmS6Wl8JuwAsSS7oAaCwSsejiSLKegJYdkr58xj5M9gBUY5hwNs6cH5xfewN3n1hU%3D) | [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=3d8b2d738acf40869bbcf1d65afc3ce4&_e=yfMvTt8xAFyzizYWZ_fcNWl6Ylh_xSyzN0fm-ZnlefFN8OKkMGHNIZ-qVEZxUDT2K0vDVTQmKMcguqBI3PZIrVSpUN35bHDB1g8WSW_lZ0kQNmSmDdEGfejG0WUMlDpg171xr4nM4mhPvU6JRpx6KO5egr2sZMwjtP-4nZ5LBfpUujWsa6F3YrUazxSvOw0wwMKS4barPdnsX54cty_eMm0yhM8eZjV-ZeKKoyhboBAy2G1mZXiG_mAt9maJUCu2GdwkIJltHtwWvjcVSBPZdA%3D%3D)

name: Team Collier
subject: No plans to fix the grid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
**Folks — Today the Special Session of the 87th legislative session begins, and Gov. Greg Abbott and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick laid out an agenda that does little to nothing to solve our state's biggest challenges.** Instead, it pulls from the same playbook Texas Republicans have used for decades: distract from their failures by waging false culture wars and stripping away fundamental voting rights for Texans. There are no plans to fix our state’s rickety power grid, fund our schools and hospitals, invest in a just economic recovery for struggling workers, and take action on climate change. _Nothing._ We cannot allow Republicans to ignore the needs of everyday Texans any longer. There is still time to address the grid and push for solutions. That’s why we need to be ready to fight back against their anti-democratic agenda. **Pitch in any amount today to help us put pressure on Gov. clean_body: | Folks — Today the Special Session of the 87th legislative session begins, and Gov. Greg Abbott and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick laid out an agenda that does little to nothing to solve our state's biggest challenges. Instead, it pulls from the same playbook Texas Republicans have used for decades: distract from their failures by waging false culture wars and stripping away fundamental voting rights for Texans. There are no plans to fix our state’s rickety power grid, fund our schools and hospitals, invest in a just economic recovery for struggling workers, and take action on climate change. Nothing. We cannot allow Republicans to ignore the needs of everyday Texans any longer. There is still time to address the grid and push for solutions. That’s why we need to be ready to fight back against their anti-democratic agenda. Pitch in any amount today to help us put pressure on Gov. Abbott and Dan Patrick to stop the stunts, get to work, and fix the damn grid >> If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Patrick has an opportunity right now_ to do right by the people of our great state and deliver them a fully repaired, updated, and modernized energy grid. Thanks for raising your voices. Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

---
Peter,

Critical race theory is divisive down to its very core.

It's a movement that seeks to indoctrinate our children, rewrite history, and spit in the face of civil rights.

There's no place for it in our classrooms, our military, or our government - and I'm not going to stop saying that anytime soon.
[**I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57897487:6k_pa3leN:m:1:3253819041:C4E459FB23CCCE4D699EDF151AAE6F54:r)
The Biden-Harris administration has embraced this out-of-touch philosophy because they've been completely overrun by the radicals within their party.

You thought the Green New Deal was bad? Or maybe that 1 year+ of lockdowns would be the worst of it?

The truth is - that was only the beginning.

_The radical left wants to divide every American, replace every institution, and rebuild our nation to resemble the "socialist utopia" hellscape they've always wanted._

Putting an end to Critical Race Theory is just one step in stopping their destructive plans.

As a Senator, I have the chance to stand up to the bureaucrats implementing critical race theory, but I need your help to show our strength against this radicalism. Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?

You can use this secure link: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2563203/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57897487:6k_pa3leN:m:1:3253819041:C4E459FB23CCCE4D699EDF151AAE6F54:r)**

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Tom Fitton
subject: President Biden’s open-borders policies are a disaster
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is _challenging_ Biden administration open-borders policies, _fighting_ for conservatives' right to free speech, and _exposing_ the Left's efforts to indoctrinate our children in public schools including:
* **_We sued the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services for records about assaults on and abuse of unaccompanied alien children in its custody_**. President Biden's open-borders policies are a disaster, which neither he nor the elite media acknowledge. _We 're making sure the American people learn the ugly truth about the impact of Biden's refusal to enforce our laws against illegal immigration _...including facts about the abuse and neglect of migrant children in federal facilities.

* **_We 're in court on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot_. **Mayor Lightfoot stunned even liberals when she announced that she would give one-on-one interviews "only to Black or Brown journalists." We're not letting any elected politician escape accountability for race-based discrimination, which in this case violates both our First _and_ Fourteenth Amendment rights!

| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56132&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDgxNDAxMDM=)
---

* **_We sued the U.S. Department of Defense (DOD) for records related to attacks made on commentator Tucker Carlson._** When Carlson criticized new politically-correct Department of Defense policies in one of his broadcasts, he was subjected to coordinated social media attacks on his First Amendment-protected speech. _We 're using the courts to get the facts about this outrageous effort to curb free speech by conservatives_.

* **_And we exposed the use of taxpayer dollars to promote "Critical Race Theory" teaching in public schools_**. A Judicial Watch investigation shows that a Maryland public school system spread radical left-wing propaganda in a junior high school course by teaching students that "**Make America Great Again** " was an example of "**covert white****supremacy**." We won't let extremists peddling their politically-driven poison to children in public school classrooms go unexposed and unchallenged!

Because of that heavy caseload, I respectfully ask that you consider **_[making your best contribution to Judicial Watch right now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56132&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDgxNDAxMDM=)_** , because standing strong today is _the most important thing you can do right now to defend the rule of law_.

I am not exaggerating. ** We must keep fighting _with maximum impact_ on behalf of the rule of law and transparency and accountability in government. **And **_[with your support now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56132&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDgxNDAxMDM=)_** , we will carry on this fight and continue to be the largest and most impactful watchdog group in the country. Thank you.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

P.S. Judicial Watch is the _only organization in Washington_ effectively using the courts to hold corrupt and secretive government officials and politicians (in _both_ parties) accountable. That's why **_[your support is so important now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56132&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDgxNDAxMDM=)_**. Thank you!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56132&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDgxNDAxMDM=)

clean_body: It’s official. | Peter, Did you hear the AMAZING NEWS? Republican Senator Tim Scott has officially announced his campaign for re-election to the United States Senate! and working around the clock to build a grassroots team that can take on and defeat the Democrats. Our records show that you’re one of the most dedicated conservatives in Englewood, FL, so we’re reaching out to you first. Photo Credit: Twitter (@votetimscott) | | | | | | Leading Republicans across the nation are proudly stepping up to stand by Tim Scott’s side on Day One: President Donald Trump endorses Tim Scott Senator Lindsey Graham endorses Tim Scott Senator Ted Cruz endorses Tim Scott Senator Marco Rubio endorses Tim Scott Senator Tom Cotton endorses Tim Scott Senator Joni Ernst endorses Tim Scott Rep. Kevin McCarthy endorses Tim Scott Rep. Elise Stefanik endorses Tim Scott Rep. Byron Donalds endorses Tim Scott Rep. Nancy Mace endorses Tim Scott John James endorses Tim Scott Herschel Walker endorses Tim Scott Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel endorses Tim Scott But there’s one more Leading Republican whose name we need to add to the Official Supporters List, Peter -- and that’s yours. | Thank you. name: Kolin Kearns
subject: Tell Congress: We must invest in clean energy & climate action
body:
#NoClimateNoDeal

| | | Urge Congress to pass the American Jobs Plan to make historic investments in infrastructure and clean energy jobs.
---
| [Act now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32083571/294661343/926972508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzYxMjk2ZC0xOGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBaJk-PXMxIaGYTnc-OhgxGwlaAm1X58fCQgmS7sXHI=&emci=5c1da89c-07e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7c61296d-18e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
Last month was the hottest on record in North America. Last week, the waters of the Gulf of Mexico caught fire after a gas pipeline ruptured.
**We can’t afford to wait any longer to address the climate crisis. It’s time for our leaders to meet the moment and start delivering solutions. **
Right now, Congress is considering President Biden’s American Jobs Plan — an unprecedented investment in clean energy and environmental justice. Over the coming days, it will be on us to ensure that Democrats remain steadfast in their commitments on climate.
[Urge Congress to pass the American Jobs Plan to fully invest in much-needed infrastructure and spur a clean energy economy to combat the climate crisis.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32083572/294661345/-639111433?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzYxMjk2ZC0xOGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBaJk-PXMxIaGYTnc-OhgxGwlaAm1X58fCQgmS7sXHI=&emci=5c1da89c-07e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7c61296d-18e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Even as a bipartisan, watered down infrastructure bill comes to a vote this month, Senate Democrats are moving forward with an ambitious reconciliation package to implement President Biden’s American Jobs Plan. Whatever they do, however they do it — climate must be part of the equation, and with your help we can get it over the finish line.
If passed, the American Jobs Plan would create a new Civilian Climate Corps, implement a national clean energy standard, replace all lead pipes nationwide, and eliminate tax subsidies for fossil fuel corporations.
We can’t waver on our demand that Senate Democrats pass big, bold climate legislation that fully funds President Biden’s vision to revolutionize our clean energy economy.
[Tell Congress: It’s #NoClimateNoDeal. It’s time to pass the American Jobs Plan so we can create clean energy jobs and lead on the fight against climate change.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32083575/294661346/2089771922?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzYxMjk2ZC0xOGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBaJk-PXMxIaGYTnc-OhgxGwlaAm1X58fCQgmS7sXHI=&emci=5c1da89c-07e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7c61296d-18e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Thank you,
Kolin Kearns
National Digital Campaigns Manager
NextGen America
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/5c1da89c-07e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/7c61296d-18e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzYxMjk2ZC0xOGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBaJk-PXMxIaGYTnc-OhgxGwlaAm1X58fCQgmS7sXHI=&id=109799863)

name: Navarre for Congress Newsletter
subject: What we’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email]- Check out what Stewart has been up to in our Navarre Newsletter -
👇👇👇👇👇
What an eventful few months it’s been!
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email]
It was only three months ago that Stewart declared his candidacy for Virginia’s First District, but in these short three months, a lot has happened! Stewart has met folks where they are -- whether it’s with one of the 20 County Parties over Zoom or getting out into the community and meeting folks in-person.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email]
Every day, more and more folks are learning about Stewart and his story and they’ve been incredibly receptive. That’s why we’re confident that our grassroots movement will only grow as we journey into the second half of 2021 together.
We’ve also had the Virginia state-wide election this past month!
As one of only two states holding statewide elections in the entire country, a lot of eyes have been on Virginia. Stewart hit the pavement for the primary helping our great down-ballot candidates with poll watching and will continue supporting the candidates on the ballot this year.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email]
And finally, a BIG thank you to our supporters!
This campaign could not have been such a success so far without the support of all of you. Stewart is extremely grateful for all that you’ve done for his campaign these past few months. He knows that the road ahead to 2022 will be a long one, but Team Navarre is excited to have all of you on board for it.
You came up big in helping us hit our fundraising goals for our first public fundraising quarter last month. Now, if you’re able, please consider chipping in to get us a head start on our third quarter July fundraising. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn?refcode=210708-email]
Thank you again for your dedication and support. We will talk again soon!
-- Team Navarre for Congress
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/70399401-19e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/e50cc107-19e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTBjYzEwNy0xOWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sRmy0U5nxsb4T0SNMCpkf6pGLocP2KkydOUJeXUD2qg=&id=108459448 .

clean_body: And he’s fighting for you. | Peter, I know President Trump. Yesterday’s news that he’s suing the Big Tech Companies is just another example of how he’s willing to stand on the frontlines and take fire from the left and put America First. But the fact is that even a tireless fighter like President Trump needs reinforcements. And as he’s said many times, seeing Republican Patriots step up and join him gives him the energy to keep fighting. | DONOR FILE EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | For President Trump, the fight against Big Tech is bigger than his own personal battle. It’s about the very soul of America: defending Free Speech from the Silicon Valley Liberals who want to silence our movement. But President Trump can’t take on the world alone. He needs Republican Patriots like you by his side. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Team NH GOP
subject: Join us for a Night at LaBelle Winery on Saturday, July 17th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
We will be joined for this exclusive event by Tommy Hicks, RNC Co-Chair, along with a special guest
Derek,

Join the New Hampshire GOP, RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks, and a special guest at LaBelle Winery in Amherst on Saturday, July 17th for an exclusive event.
Attendance for this event is extremely limited, and _tickets will sell out_. name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: fwd: Establishment candidates outraised Erica
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Not going to lie, it's pretty heartbreaking.
#
Hi there! It’s Jayla, campaign finance director at Erica Smith for U.S. Senate.
Just a quick note from me today. I wanted to see if you saw yesterday’s email about our Q2 fundraising (see below).
_Yeahhhhh..._ Not going to lie, finding out that Erica was outraised by not one, but _two_ of our establishment Democratic primary opponents (before I’ve even finished calculating our final Q2 fundraising total!) is pretty heartbreaking.
[**_So, is there any chance you could please donate just $10 or more today to our campaign today? Erica Smith is the only candidate in this primary running a true grassroots campaign fueled by online, small-dollar donations — with no help from corporate PACs, fossil fuel lobbyists, or the establishment._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4628?refcode=em20210708-242&t=1&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4628?refcode=em20210708-242&t=2&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)**
I hope you’re willing and able to help our campaign out today. I know I’ll be spending the rest of the day trying to figure out how we can catch up and close the gap.
Thanks for everything!
— Jayla
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: Erica Smith HQ <info@ericaforus.com>
Date: Wed, Jul 7, 2021
Subject: Establishment candidates outraised Erica
**THIS JUST IN:** Erica’s well-funded, establishment-backed opponents announced bringing in massive fundraising hauls this past quarter.
**As it stands, our grassroots campaign was _heavily outraised_ in the second quarter of one of the *most* competitive Senate primaries — and that puts us at a huge disadvantage.**
In a race with national attention and super PAC investment, we need to have the resources to compete and continue growing our moral movement to elect a progressive champion like Erica.
[**_So, we’re asking: Can you make a $10 donation to Erica right now and help close the gap? Your donation will play a key part in growing our campaign and challenging the old guard establishment within the Democratic Party._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4628?refcode=em20210708-242&t=3&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4628?refcode=em20210708-242&t=22&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)**
**We know Erica is the best candidate to fight for all North Carolinians in the U.S. Senate.** She is the only candidate in this primary who will fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a living wage, and fight to abolish the filibuster.
But campaigns like ours face an uphill battle, and winning in North Carolina won’t be easy — but we can do it if we push hard this quarter and build a massive coalition of diverse, working-class people in every corner of the state.
[**_Will you make a $10 donation to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate right now? We must raise as much as possible to compete with our establishment opponents and build a winning campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4628?refcode=em20210708-242&t=23&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4628?refcode=em20210708-242&t=24&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)**
Let’s do this!
Thanks,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210708-242-footer&t=25&refcode2=242_3698_weYfHM&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=242%2E3698%2EweYfHM)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: John Fetterman
subject: Peter's response to our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group: ❌ Pending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I really want to know what issue you think should be our top focus heading into Q3?
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210708-1937-header&t=1&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)
Peter, our team launched our *official* Q3 Grassroots Focus Group yesterday, and the response we've seen so far has been through the roof.
But I gotta admit... I took a quick peek at our records, and I noticed one big thing missing:
**You still haven't participated yet, Peter!**
[**_Click here to enter our official online Focus Group right away. I promise it'll only take a moment._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210708-1937&t=2&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)
**[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210708-1937&t=3&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)**
You see, it's _suuuuper_ important to me to hear exactly where you stand on the issues, and what you think about the overall trajectory of our campaign.
The only way we can win this ultra-competitive Senate seat is if each of us does our part to make a personal stake in this race — **so please take a few minutes to be a part of our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group right now. I'm really eager to hear what you think.**
[What issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21878?source=ema20210708-1937&t=4&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT) Select an issue: Health care COVID-19 Jobs and income equality Climate change Ending white nationalist domestic terrorism Weed legalization and justice Racial justice and reparations Unions and workers’ rights Affordable housing LGBTQIA+ rights Ending Washington corruption Education Immigrants’ rights Ending forever wars Campaign finance reform Gun violence prevention College affordability and student debt Reproductive justice Ending the opioid epidemic **[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210708-1937&t=5&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)**
---
[**_Peter, our Focus Group is still running, but it won’t be open forever. So please, will you answer a few quick questions as part of our official online Focus Group to help our team decide what we should focus on in Q3?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210708-1937&t=6&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)
I can't wait to hear from you.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. The surest way we can flip this Senate seat in 2022 is by coming together to build a campaign that is truly representative of all of our country's working people — and that requires direct feedback from folks like you. [** _Nobody's a better representative of your state than you when it comes to sharing your thoughts, Peter, so please take a moment to start our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210708-1937&t=7&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210708-1937-footer&t=8&refcode2=1937_434096_m47biT&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=1937%2E434096%2Em47biT)

subject: We've Triggered the Left

| It seems we have triggered the radical Left by standing up for our American values and for being willing to actually fight for what we believe in.

When I launched my new group - **[CAVPAC](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=30eb91bd13d348a58fd6dcbbd0844a9a&_e=fqUhPl9_CzQKsFYnTMa6QJuaIXE9OL1utDiH3d9nC5CJ5RGyZHAxMDcwtTqacPN6eP4815hVqEBnucHGKmoums5VWDIOh-XXAsQC98IOP5Poau48_CUOVX-38WHNlfLq118O9kdRlAeyBBwkcJjjVkIMSvQhyJ4GVROadxOdof0I8H2iDKS_XKla29nQxqqVF56cRxrxkDORZ3Lecma-I9HmcVJVJpKnllG_nzp3f0KFultJl1SKR2E18ncd4sECIpvwBJyoPtMGxcLpbNWAUyJg0yx5lpCKTKkrQNVsIgwtEjAIO0gzPstU7emg-0FwLf553qzOGoErGs0r1QbaOSDbCnojtWla5T6Klhu3nxVjJuIFQM8SDX0fCMYRO-uQFmKRLZgLpTD4e9D0ck6SNA8QFN3tPyCTcLqflj9VDSKxBXjEUVJsHB0gGHGlaupwL01F-Dj6NI6qymlcWlIT2rTwS_tYxy57us3o91h-KVHsEjz6s8d4ZlunIBZN0N2YhGY161qVMnPWeMR9Zb2AuA%3D%3D "CAVPAC ")** \- we called on all patriotic Americans who care about our core values to join as Pipehitters in our Conservative Cavalry. This clearly spooked the Democrats because they started mocking me and our dedicated supporters.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=30eb91bd13d348a58fd6dcbbd0844a9a&_e=fqUhPl9_CzQKsFYnTMa6QJuaIXE9OL1utDiH3d9nC5CJ5RGyZHAxMDcwtTqacPN6eP4815hVqEBnucHGKmoums5VWDIOh-XXAsQC98IOP5Poau48_CUOVX-38WHNlfLq118O9kdRlAeyBBwkcJjjVkIMSvQhyJ4GVROadxOdof0I8H2iDKS_XKla29nQxqqVF56cRxrxkDORZ3Lecma-I9HmcVJVJpKnllG_nzp3f0KFultJl1SKR2E18ncd4sECIpvwBJyoPtMGxcLpbNWAUyJg0yx5lpCKTKkrQNVsIgzUqtSknBg2NzqAIk0D1XMz9cH-NsAdnhjnjlTh94KAyiVYikiK961c38Bk0nERfYLdrjhdTleB1PPhQmH1E_EJlCj3FkLCOHjhjeuHFdL7M5dpgbemYiIzuNySm4Vn6RJe2Bk8KOwvxURFcdNv8h7Pjf336lSLR90RmnRtj5yjvCsYiV46Tom2nk4i4JBuPcvgXhUdvaAoAxrm-9RiOGwV3rRSmtWuwWhe9ISv6JrvuQ%3D%3D)
---
But we don't back down in the face of attacks. Pipehitters are unapologetically American and will never give an inch in the fight for our future. Pipehitters are the radical Left's worst nightmare because we won't let them destroy our country.

Working in the Trump Administration, I am used to being attacked by the "woke" mob for doing what is right. Thankfully, my parents raised me to not let bullies push me around. That's why I'm doubling down my efforts to recruit more proud Americans to join us in the battle for the future of our country.
**Show the Radical Left They Can 't Bully Us**
---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=30eb91bd13d348a58fd6dcbbd0844a9a&_e=fqUhPl9_CzQKsFYnTMa6QJuaIXE9OL1utDiH3d9nC5CJ5RGyZHAxMDcwtTqacPN6eP4815hVqEBnucHGKmoums5VWDIOh-XXAsQC98IOP5Poau48_CUOVX-38WHNlfLq118O9kdRlAeyBBwkcJjjVkIMSvQhyJ4GVROadxOdof0I8H2iDKS_XKla29nQxqqVF56cRxrxkDORZ3Lecma-I9HmcVJVJpKnllG_nzp3f0KFultJl1SKR2E18ncd4sECIpvwBJyoPtMGxcLpbNWAUyJg0yx5lpCKTKkrQNVsIgzrpjF2yG_PTISfhrxIcdlVZA6zH3GbDN6xrKIdMyNGIYHDrosVkYePzZbL9TKM_rCLfs3p2txFfb_gIUL9h2Th-AHl6sRoHobGurd1d0LNq46BVnQ7hMmD_bokvxik-kPhn7RchjAqO7FXa_iB1s0P7IK1Stp_fsvgdXpGhV_0DamncyMPFdR-ofRfrN6civRsEX5cMgliIOqL6U8C3RYqSnjjupqsRGeqKhVbj6i3Dg%3D%3D "Join CAVPAC")
---
Nothing will bother Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and AOC more than seeing a list of thousands and thousands of patriots who refuse to back down from our American values. **[So, I'm encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren't giving an inch.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=30eb91bd13d348a58fd6dcbbd0844a9a&_e=fqUhPl9_CzQKsFYnTMa6QJuaIXE9OL1utDiH3d9nC5CJ5RGyZHAxMDcwtTqacPN6eP4815hVqEBnucHGKmoums5VWDIOh-XXAsQC98IOP5Poau48_CUOVX-38WHNlfLq118O9kdRlAeyBBwkcJjjVkIMSvQhyJ4GVROadxOdof0I8H2iDKS_XKla29nQxqqVF56cRxrxkDORZ3Lecma-I9HmcVJVJpKnllG_nzp3f0KFultJl1SKR2E18ncd4sECIpvwBJyoPtMGxcLpbNWAUyJg0yx5lpCKTKkrQNVsIgz_iYXdxahi-zG-JAjkrYrewVYHe6bTWWzdyoANQgNHOs-KXYblriGYg4FxfHVyF2oZ4bnFK_B-qSmMJm4eT3BPO8mGjhjdLdD2rmr66bZhf83qiH9mJlSg_WDUswemU3VAdKGLOwbjyk716Hi3zL4rjItvJEUuILISrA4e0lVMI39OmGZXlXDVrnfnspkAwP8_iDa-YcvwI7Ho9LpDa4sQhwX_5_U2G3IYGrqBpoJA-Q%3D%3D "So, I’m encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren’t giving an inch.")**

The battle for the future of our country is a worthy one, and I know we will be victorious if grassroot conservatives from all across the country join me in championing American values.

Never Give An Inch,

name: Team Padilla
subject: We are respectfully asking you to sign this petition and call on Congress to take action on climate change >>
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends ––

With record heat waves, droughts, and flooding devastating our country,
how can we afford to not address climate change?

The climate crisis cannot be solved without addressing the underlying
dysfunction currently built into our political system, and we can start by
eliminating the filibuster.

Unfortunately, we have a Congress that is letting us down. Their failure
to act over the years is a price we will all have to pay in the years and
generations to come unless we find a way to act sooner.

Alex knows that bold policies like the Green New Deal are what we need to
fight climate change. Because it’s clear we must do everything in our
power to slow and reverse the effects of climate change.

Now, we just need Congress to take climate change seriously and take
immediate steps to slow its effects. Which is where you come
in!

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/climate_change/?source=em210708-1-subs&t=1001&akid=144%2E159979%2EI8NnmH ]Add your name next to Alex’s and tell Congress it’s time to take action
on climate change. It’s up to all of us to take action to end this crisis,
and your support will go a long way towards showing Congress that this
issue is a top priority.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/climate_change/?source=em210708-1-subs&t=1002&akid=144%2E159979%2EI8NnmH ]ADD YOUR NAME

California has long led the nation on climate action. We’ve endured
unprecedented wildfires and extreme weather events and have taken
important steps to address this existential threat.

Now we need the rest of the nation to join California in the fight to
preserve our land, air, and water for generations to come.

Thank you for adding your name and taking climate change seriously.

Team Padilla

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/climate_change/?source=em210708-1-subs&t=1003&akid=144%2E159979%2EI8NnmH ]ADD YOUR NAME

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=144%2E159979%2EI8NnmH

This clearly spooked the Democrats because they started mocking me and our dedicated supporters.

But we don't back down in the face of attacks. Pipehitters are unapologetically American and will never give an inch in the fight for our future. Pipehitters are the radical Left's worst nightmare because we won't let them destroy our country.

Working in the Trump Administration, I am used to being attacked by the "woke" mob for doing what is right. Thankfully, my parents raised me to not let bullies push me around. That's why I'm doubling down my efforts to recruit more proud Americans to join us in the battle for the future of our country.
**Show the Radical Left They Can 't Bully Us**

---

Never Give An Inch,

body:
| | | **MATT GAETZ: "My vote for Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives will go to Donald J. Trump"**

We're on high alert.

**FIRST:**

After losing the White House, Trump swore he'd hold power again.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQrGK_)

**THEN:**

Matt Gaetz, one of Trump's top loyalists in Congress, announced his support for Trump to become SPEAKER if Republicans defeat our House Majority.

**NOW:**

**[We need your immediate $1 to ensure Trump NEVER becomes Speaker and defend our House Majority from his schemes to retake power.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

| | [**Chip in $1 >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

The situation is dire.

Trump himself has already expressed interest in becoming Speaker.

And his mega donors have already rushed him **$85 MILLION** to put his plans into action.

So we can't afford to let Matt Gaetz's SHOCKING announcement go unaddressed.

**We must respond by rising up in HISTORIC numbers -- 1,5OO grassroots Democrats strong before midnight -- to defend our House Majority and ensure Trump never holds the People 's Gavel.**

Will you chip in $1 to fuel our fight and protect our House Democrats from Matt Gaetz, Donald Trump, and all their disgusting schemes?

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45269595&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MjE2NjczMgS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: | | | MATT GAETZ: "My vote for Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives will go to Donald J. Trump" We're on high alert. FIRST: After losing the White House, Trump swore he'd hold power again. THEN: Matt Gaetz, one of Trump's top loyalists in Congress, announced his support for Trump to become SPEAKER if Republicans defeat our House Majority. NOW: | | The situation is dire. Trump himself has already expressed interest in becoming Speaker. And his mega donors have already rushed him $85 MILLION to put his plans into action. So we can't afford to let Matt Gaetz's SHOCKING announcement go unaddressed. We must respond by rising up in HISTORIC numbers -- 1,5OO grassroots Democrats strong before midnight -- to defend our House Majority and ensure Trump never holds the People 's Gavel. Will you chip in $1 to fuel our fight and protect our House Democrats from Matt Gaetz, Donald Trump, and all their disgusting schemes? | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Ras Smith
subject: Where we begin is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32087359/294674085/1890419508?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210708basics_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA0ZWZhOC0yNWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyO-QiFAMyoXd3fWCJwpXEarpDXeCk7y7X0msgK__0U=)
---
Friends, When it comes to finding solutions to the challenges we face here in Iowa, where we begin is important, and that means starting by **being bold about the basics:** good schools, good jobs, and good opportunities for all Iowans to _thrive._ | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32087360/294674086/1890419508?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210708basics_rs_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA0ZWZhOC0yNWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyO-QiFAMyoXd3fWCJwpXEarpDXeCk7y7X0msgK__0U=)
---
Iowa can once again have the best schools in the nation, if we prioritize taking care of students and families, and valuing educators.
We can ensure that all Iowans have the opportunity to start looking past the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation. Let’s start by moving folks from $15 an hour to $50,000 a year.
If we help our farmers invest in resilient agriculture practices, we will empower them to become the solution to climate change and give rural Iowa a chance to thrive in the 21st Century.
These are basic, but some would say bold, ideas. I believe every Iowan deserves these, and as your next Governor, I’ll work as hard as I can, day in and out, to make it happen.
**[If you’re with me and want to work together to see these goals through, pitch in $10 or $25 (whatever you can) to fuel this campaign and keep our momentum going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32087361/294674087/1890419508?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210708basics_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA0ZWZhOC0yNWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyO-QiFAMyoXd3fWCJwpXEarpDXeCk7y7X0msgK__0U=)**
