name: Mike Lee
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c289%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YPDMprG3GoBoguqLvgK5ZQ&sysid=1)
Our schools are no longer safe havens; woke activists and cultural Marxists have recognized the impact they can have by influencing our...
| [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4827%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nxwrQ6YoK8IwIP8QEIr9kQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

Our schools are no longer safe havens; woke activists and cultural Marxists have recognized the impact they can have by influencing our children with things like Critical Race Theory and socialism in our schools.

So what are we supposed to do? Trust politicians to save us?

No, I don’t believe politicians can save us--and I am one! Ultimately, saving our country requires brave parents and patriots to respond to these threats.

Friend, I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different. This isn’t for some campaign or candidate that needs money. This is a powerful solution to help teach and protect our kids.

I am emailing you to introduce my friend, Connor Boyack, who is educating our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism, and teaching them about the ideas of liberty.
Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children’s books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, entrepreneurship, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers.
---
[ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4828%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZYaYjaLq26ADKUJTxLZALg&sysid=1)
---
He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries. [Each $10 donation helps Connor distribute one copy of the Tuttle Twins to a family, homeschooler, school, or library. You can donate ANY amount by clicking here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4829%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5bupVepEHmIDkOBAHZhubQ&sysid=1) So far, Connor has distributed over 2.5 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. Connor is leading the fight against socialist influence in our schools by creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. [Here is how Connor and his nonprofit, Libertas Institute, plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4820%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wx6IciJwvahpU1vIPzbzIg&sysid=1)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history can receive copies and additional materials for education at home.

2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.

3. In order to do this, they must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4821%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GaOUAyzoj0b1UD4aWSdGyg&sysid=1)

The reality is politicians cannot save us. Brave parents and patriots who are willing to stand up and fight for the rising generation can defeat bad ideas including Critical Race Theory, “Woke” culture, and socialism. Connor is a personal friend of mine. In 2010, he helped me win my first election to the United States Senate. Since then, he’s founded Libertas Institute, a free market non-profit organization, and created the Tuttle Twins to teach kids about the ideas of freedom. As a personal favor to me, please help Connor and Libertas Institute save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with Tuttle Twins books! Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child! I told Connor I would help reach a $20,000 goal in the next 48 hours. All online donations are MATCHED by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift. [Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4822%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uq0m4%2bJhmyUFLQ%2bjge74Gw&sysid=1)
[Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4823%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PyfizpMeZIpmmmPrq%2b7BvA&sysid=1)
[Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4824%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2TIXMb1NdvLzN7k69o3lug&sysid=1)
[Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4835%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5G5aiHdCRLY2%2bmFpxTPiqQ&sysid=1)
[Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4836%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sQVVQ7C76ErnhmyQCZ9Iag&sysid=1)
[Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4837%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9PYRusndFrTXTWeHzGTkqQ&sysid=1)
[Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4838%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G6dNLc1%2bPWkaHKe09e%2fZhw&sysid=1)
[Donate Any Amount Here >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4839%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F9ff9TUP1%2bhZX1bfdn%2f7JA&sysid=1) The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them!
---
[ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4830%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uWxG%2fV%2boEBPe6XwgUXdDnQ&sysid=1)
---
As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and are one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. With the massive rise in homeschooling, let’s make sure every family has a copy available to them.

[Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4831%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kpAscFc4CaOs1oQgGxTlOA&sysid=1)

If you love our country, love our Constitution, and love the ideas of freedom, I encourage you to donate to Libertas Institute’s project, the Tuttle Twins.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[Here is the link to donate again.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4832%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KEj1pNPhIJbY56FqIyr1JQ&sysid=1)

Thank you for everything you do to fight and preserve liberty and our Republic,
---
---
## U.S. Senator Mike Lee

---
| _107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c289%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YPDMprG3GoBoguqLvgK5ZQ&sysid=1)_

Connor is leading the fight against socialist influence in our schools by creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. 1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history can receive copies and additional materials for education at home. 2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism. 3. In order to do this, they must raise funds to print and distribute these books. The reality is politicians cannot save us. Brave parents and patriots who are willing to stand up and fight for the rising generation can defeat bad ideas including Critical Race Theory, “Woke” culture, and socialism. Connor is a personal friend of mine. In 2010, he helped me win my first election to the United States Senate. Since then, he’s founded Libertas Institute, a free market non-profit organization, and created the Tuttle Twins to teach kids about the ideas of freedom. As a personal favor to me, please help Connor and Libertas Institute save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with Tuttle Twins books! Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child! I told Connor I would help reach a $20,000 goal in the next 48 hours. All online donations are MATCHED by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift. The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them! As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and are one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools. This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. With the massive rise in homeschooling, let’s make sure every family has a copy available to them. If you love our country, love our Constitution, and love the ideas of freedom, I encourage you to donate to Libertas Institute’s project, the Tuttle Twins. Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me. Thank you for everything you do to fight and preserve liberty and our Republic, U.S. Senator Mike Lee | 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 | ---|---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Will you add your name and personally endorse our campaign for Senate? This is important, and your support will go a long way.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Last month, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking Mark. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.
One of the ways we planned to counter this massive wave of outside spending was by raising over 100,000 small-dollar donations online last month.
Another way we plan on staying in the fight is by having people like you personally endorse our campaign. So far, thousands of people have signed on to say they have Mark’s back, and we’re hoping to add another 10,000 to that number this month.
It’s a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: _keep Mark in the Senate where he can use science, data, and facts to improve people’s lives._
**So that’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen yet on our list of folks who have signed on to make their personal endorsement.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign for Senate? It’s important for Mark and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side and hold this seat.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-july?source=em210708-1-15&t=1&akid=918%2E6688874%2ENXFboU)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-july?source=em210708-1-15&t=2&akid=918%2E6688874%2ENXFboU)
Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Mark can make a big difference in this race.
Because when you and thousands of others all speak out and say you’re with Mark, you become part of a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives — and that’s something worth fighting for.
Thank you in advance for adding your name,
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-july?source=em210708-1-15&t=3&akid=918%2E6688874%2ENXFboU)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=918%2E6688874%2ENXFboU).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Peter, Trump is speaking on Sunday and needs all America First patriots on deck to make his speech a success. _That brings us to one very important question:_

**Will you watch Trump's speech on Sunday?**

Trump needs to know you have his back and, as a Top Trump Patriot, we know you won't let him down. [**This one-click poll will take 10 seconds to complete but will go a long way to giving Trump the support he needs at this critical moment.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57896241:6WTYB3lNh:m:1:3253819041:E17FC2FBD219BB1A4B30D7C70F3E632A:r)

It's more important than ever to stand with Trump and House Republicans. The Democrats are so blinded by hate they will not stop until they undo Trump's pro-job America First legacy in its entirety.

_Biden wants to put America LAST and will undermine all of Trump 's conservative achievements from the last four years._

[**It 's a simple yes or no question, Peter: Will you watch Trump's speech on Sunday? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57896241:6WTYB3lNh:m:1:3253819041:E17FC2FBD219BB1A4B30D7C70F3E632A:r)

The media, Democrats, pollsters, and pundits will be paying VERY close attention. We need to have a HUGE audience to prove to them Trump and House conservatives are stronger than ever.

name: Heidi St. John
subject: It's so good to be home!
body:
There's nothing like coming home.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Hi Friends!

For the past 6 weeks I have been traveling with my family on a (previously scheduled) speaking tour throughout our wonderful United States. I have done this more than several times before, and I'm always struck by the beautiful mix of scenic landscapes, booming metropolitan cities, and quaint country towns. I love this country...all of it.

I made the most of every opportunity while I was out of the district. I had the amazing opportunity to meet President Trump and General Michael Flynn. I spent valuable time with Rep. Mary Miller, Rep. Lauren Boebert, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Green, Rep. Debbie Lesko, and more.

There is nothing like coming home, though, and now it's time to get to work here. We have 390 days until the August 2022 primary when the voters make the choice of which two candidates will be on the 2022 General Election ballot. I plan to be the strong voice in that race, representing you and what is important to you.

I cannot do this without you and for this I am thankful. My favorite part of this journey is the people. You. I want to sit with you. I want to listen to your concerns and meet your friends.

My schedule is filling up quickly! Let us know if you'd like me to join you for an event. Just click the link below to send the team an email. I have the best, most encouraging team of leaders engaged as Field Directors in the counties and they are ready to put you to work.

We have a lot of fun events planned and many ways for you to be involved!

It's time to get off the bench and run toward the battle.
|
---
| | |
---
|

clean_body: There's nothing like coming home. | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Hi Friends! For the past 6 weeks I have been traveling with my family on a (previously scheduled) speaking tour throughout our wonderful United States. I have done this more than several times before, and I'm always struck by the beautiful mix of scenic landscapes, booming metropolitan cities, and quaint country towns. I love this country...all of it. I made the most of every opportunity while I was out of the district. I had the amazing opportunity to meet President Trump and General Michael Flynn. I spent valuable time with Rep. Mary Miller, Rep. Lauren Boebert, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Green, Rep. Debbie Lesko, and more. There is nothing like coming home, though, and now it's time to get to work here. We have 390 days until the August 2022 primary when the voters make the choice of which two candidates will be on the 2022 General Election ballot. I plan to be the strong voice in that race, representing you and what is important to you. I cannot do this without you and for this I am thankful. My favorite part of this journey is the people. You. I want to sit with you. I want to listen to your concerns and meet your friends. My schedule is filling up quickly! Let us know if you'd like me to join you for an event. Just click the link below to send the team an email. I have the best, most encouraging team of leaders engaged as Field Directors in the counties and they are ready to put you to work. We have a lot of fun events planned and many ways for you to be involved! It's time to get off the bench and run toward the battle. | | | | | | Tell us about your next community event or sign up to get involved in your county. | | mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com | | | | == | America's Town Hall Find out why I'm running for Congress in my latest podcast. | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Locked eyes with a terrorist
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
To explain why I am so appalled by the Left's Anti-American agenda, you need to understand what I risked for freedom I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ff781b26a80c4e1188a47a95520940a8&_e=eXE1NB4BjEjVQkTe9j6vNJGUupbPAPmiLqlktwpVECb68gjUU5EwzOnWagRcWigbwjzDxiw_9_fal9UcGFcZEVD9DuyYgSjXAnPyUov6K0zuu0sfQV_guX4XOUxWHZvu6qMAjdqbSGlmddlJj3-P4fhze8RIaZD6OkeYnUw73sej9LmhcM3HTN64xK8JwghOwa4ftj3azNB6n6_pRUdaGGuapw4mrxu9X27NhGrSkWPVN-etvNg8lAacwTfysq4mhaQ3NbIaeYd4R5poKcy4vkDy9kqWpTKAnsU16XhWdDSwh2e85tWGslCGn8234j7qtdMfAn_4eE9uVxCFZnwphyvUkmYSnjtR923_UBzes1ZFmb8Ys7-6LY6wCNhKEpKrBNkX7ohdsLF90z4k8uQdXPU84C1Lcz9Sg1XAoxZi_xFBb11Q2KANiljqYOIiXv7z)
---
Peter,

The 4th of July is a holiday to celebrate freedom, something I value to the utmost degree in my life. But to explain what freedom means to me would require you to understand the most pivotal point of my life thus far, the time where I locked eyes with a terrorist and stood up for liberty.

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

So, over this Independence Day weekend, when Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri tweeted this appalling anti-American message, I was appalled. _See the tweet here:_

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ff781b26a80c4e1188a47a95520940a8&_e=eXE1NB4BjEjVQkTe9j6vNJGUupbPAPmiLqlktwpVECb68gjUU5EwzOnWagRcWigbwjzDxiw_9_fal9UcGFcZEVD9DuyYgSjXAnPyUov6K0zuu0sfQV_guX4XOUxWHZvu6qMAjdqbSGlmddlJj3-P4fhze8RIaZD6OkeYnUw73sej9LmhcM3HTN64xK8JwghOwa4ftj3azNB6n6_pRUdaGGuapw4mrxu9X27NhGrSkWNK97v1eHMtgKvLrTf_f6LxSDpCeQwvC8AybwzOC1junETdDha96fPGWwryhqloCyy7nULi0aY-BDcIRINwJ09F1G8fK_DF1_dOM-bpDVkKtRcMkIpQGJZ8FEip6PNFxjTi0vs9PVk_zxrj_WhmqYYtb0aVLSpALlIb5qCFd9p3VLpUb4F56zkJA17l1k55oz2XQqC8S1J4kYD-qUbqhtpN)
I fought overseas for _every_ American. My best friend who fought the terrorist on the Paris-bound train with me six years ago is African American. We are bonded by our love for America and our pride in being the beacon of freedom to the remainder of the world - that’s why we risked our lives that fateful day.

I cannot sit here and explain why this woman tweeted what she did, but we must understand that the radical-Left’s destruction of American pride and attempt to weaken our democracy is hurtful, not helpful.

We need members in Congress who are PROUD to be American and willing to fight for freedom (for all) no matter the cost. The divisiveness being pushed by the radical-Left has no place in America, **because we are one nation, united, under God.**

**[If you agree with me that we need more patriots in the House to help unite Americans and celebrate our great nation rather than destroy it, would you consider pitching in just $5, $20 or even $50 towards my campaign today?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ff781b26a80c4e1188a47a95520940a8&_e=eXE1NB4BjEjVQkTe9j6vNJGUupbPAPmiLqlktwpVECb68gjUU5EwzOnWagRcWigbwjzDxiw_9_fal9UcGFcZEVD9DuyYgSjXAnPyUov6K0zuu0sfQV_guX4XOUxWHZvu6qMAjdqbSGlmddlJj3-P4fhze8RIaZD6OkeYnUw73sej9LmhcM3HTN64xK8JwghOwa4ftj3azNB6n6_pRUdaGGuapw4mrxu9X27NhGrSkWM6ZVdJ1EPL00tEFgrFlGL5wWEgSXJ-Ytxw3Zs4DGFKGzOvR2Vp0TIWIyXyXRCQf_Xhp6UIPsvVCZNkuXnnnrVAavPW-tl8VKhDsGiul7MY6DS0BFd0N9rLYn5jkwbch1rm0tUr8YekSHVCt58890E38L_hAZt0UuxEZceL1gyR9CS3Szh9L9jIoHEOqXlA0iekhky9Lb6h7ctHQeNNeaWl)**

[**DONATE TODAY
SUPPORT A PATRIOT -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ff781b26a80c4e1188a47a95520940a8&_e=eXE1NB4BjEjVQkTe9j6vNJGUupbPAPmiLqlktwpVECb68gjUU5EwzOnWagRcWigbwjzDxiw_9_fal9UcGFcZEVD9DuyYgSjXAnPyUov6K0zuu0sfQV_guX4XOUxWHZvu6qMAjdqbSGlmddlJj3-P4fhze8RIaZD6OkeYnUw73sej9LmhcM3HTN64xK8JwghOwa4ftj3azNB6n6_pRUdaGGuapw4mrxu9X27NhGrSkWNzk7dj8iFsMUvFH_Ougak20ix6rwW472VOWsbWXYud-Re-J6h6Ok1ffGJCDaD7B3GqDseVBNXHJH3-8MWXgst-8hpDhURfOm57F_ZbNipwVhAMOIftnWC1wCknzeHLGc1HiSUN8p3EXsc3Q1P2GrytXPPByiRyxV0SZjkxoJrp9ZVaXcKQ4hTCralRsVkLg9ScbZol-T6CCu6joFY-AomN)
Peter, It is no longer deemed _“cool”_ or _“popular”_ to stand up for America and to proudly say we are the greatest nation on Earth. But I am not running in a popularity contest, **I am running for Congress to fight for the liberties we were given and show the younger generations that staying strong in your values is nothing to be ashamed of - nothing to be silenced for.**

This campaign is about more than taking back one seat in Congress, it’s about taking back our pride in being Americans and continuing our work to become a nation that is a blueprint for democracy and freedom across the world.

**[Please, consider joining my campaign by contributing whatever you can spare. With your help, our message will reach every corner of the nation and we will show that America is something to be proud of.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ff781b26a80c4e1188a47a95520940a8&_e=eXE1NB4BjEjVQkTe9j6vNJGUupbPAPmiLqlktwpVECb68gjUU5EwzOnWagRcWigbwjzDxiw_9_fal9UcGFcZEVD9DuyYgSjXAnPyUov6K0zuu0sfQV_guX4XOUxWHZvu6qMAjdqbSGlmddlJj3-P4fhze8RIaZD6OkeYnUw73sej9LmhcM3HTN64xK8JwghOwa4ftj3azNB6n6_pRUdaGGuapw4mrxu9X27NhGrSkWOS5gCrITtMT8yXBmc61-6TzItBflu6boxA1KgR5ncseErkmO_qwWEiozpBCq0uBqSZai_Pncl2FvN_Gbsq-No-lYOdbemlhgvUkM5q1vgqMtLnnDKT_XfGSNUk4acKAhPQhGeJJwhSYUDJEYttMFpIZjXAIOUg9smtK9Z7Jk1gDZu0A1o1j-DPUENvpBMu87Z0S7LwXsvRv0KgrhOCmLHu)**

God Bless,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: To explain why I am so appalled by the Left's Anti-American agenda, you need to understand what I risked for freedom I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, The 4th of July is a holiday to celebrate freedom, something I value to the utmost degree in my life. But to explain what freedom means to me would require you to understand the most pivotal point of my life thus far, the time where I locked eyes with a terrorist and stood up for liberty. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day. So, over this Independence Day weekend, when Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri tweeted this appalling anti-American message, I was appalled. See the tweet here: I fought overseas for every American. My best friend who fought the terrorist on the Paris-bound train with me six years ago is African American. We are bonded by our love for America and our pride in being the beacon of freedom to the remainder of the world - that’s why we risked our lives that fateful day. I cannot sit here and explain why this woman tweeted what she did, but we must understand that the radical-Left’s destruction of American pride and attempt to weaken our democracy is hurtful, not helpful. We need members in Congress who are PROUD to be American and willing to fight for freedom (for all) no matter the cost. The divisiveness being pushed by the radical-Left has no place in America, because we are one nation, united, under God. Peter, It is no longer deemed “cool” or “popular” to stand up for America and to proudly say we are the greatest nation on Earth. But I am not running in a popularity contest, I am running for Congress to fight for the liberties we were given and show the younger generations that staying strong in your values is nothing to be ashamed of - nothing to be silenced for. This campaign is about more than taking back one seat in Congress, it’s about taking back our pride in being Americans and continuing our work to become a nation that is a blueprint for democracy and freedom across the world. God Bless, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32091360/294689537/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODExOWY2ZS0zMWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQTJ4c57ZoHpb1XQKWxWAX5UHgd_MwwvzV899QTcD3Y=) Here we go, friend.

**Governor Greg Abbott's special legislative session starts today.** As a reminder, after Democrats walked out of the regular session to block the GOP's voter suppression legislation, Abbott vetoed legislative staff pay and called this special session.

We just found out what's on the agenda. Here are some highlights: \- More voter suppression measures
\- Confiscating land from Texans on the border
\- Cuts to women's healthcare
\- Bills that target LGBTQ+ students What it doesn't include are measures to fix our struggling energy grid, health care coverage, or anything related to housing and the homelessness crisis in Austin.

It's sickening, and it must be stopped. The best way we know how is to register and turn out more voters here in our district. Turnout in Texas is still lower than the national average -- improving turnout here in Austin can make a massive dent in the GOP's margins. But our work must start now if we have a shot at flipping the state blue:

**[Will you chip in $3 so we can continue to grow our movement to win this race? | | Peter, On day one, Joe Biden made it clear that despite his election and the new Democratic majorities in Congress, he would make the effort to reach across the aisle for the good of the country. And what have Republicans offered in response? **“Eighteen more months of chaos and the inability to get stuff done. That's what we want,”** says Rep. Chip Roy (R-TX). Sound familiar? At a press conference last month in Kentucky, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell proclaimed that “One-hundred percent of our focus is on standing up to this administration.” Nothing has changed but the date for McConnell, who, during the Obama administration said “The single most important thing we want to achieve is for President Obama to be a one-term president.” | **[PROTECT OUR MAJORITY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32091942/294691395/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210708_GEN_FDR_I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3OGVmMWFhLTMzZTAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xcvy6A8047h88-ZjNbM4jDRi97XWWmb_0MI__T7EwHQ=)**

name: Team Bass
subject: It's on the Senate to finish this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello,

We need to talk about this, team: **Since George Floyd 's murder, there have been several _hundred_ people killed at the hands of law enforcement.**

The longer we go without passing substantial policing reform, the more deaths we'll see. That is the reality we live in. We absolutely need to make policing reform happen, not only because it's the right thing to do -- but because lives depend on it.

The House majority passed the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act on March 3. MARCH 3! **Now Karen needs your help keeping the pressure on high:**

**[Add your name to tell the U.S. Senate: Americans SUPPORT policing reform->](https://act.myngp.com/el/rXNSIcrlWv-lLcvNAmwSYUIIiNsCsOehJ3FYUpni_PI=/Ps4PPFqrrIkhvQvxw4T8GzRPHg1RcGekx7TMyuRfyzw=?gpsid=39_132_19654&ms=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

| [SIGN ON](https://act.myngp.com/el/rXNSIcrlWv-lLcvNAmwSYUIIiNsCsOehJ3FYUpni_PI=/Ps4PPFqrrIkhvQvxw4T8GzRPHg1RcGekx7TMyuRfyzw=?gpsid=39_132_19654&ms=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

A justice system built on injustice and racism can't be expected to correct itself. It's why Karen drafted the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to hold police accountable, to create transparency, and to _reimagine public safety_.

Karen is meeting with Senate leadership to make policing reform a reality. This has to be a joint process to make sure whatever bill the Senate passes will successfully pass through the House, too.

**[We need to show the Senate that we the people are fully behind the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act becoming the law of the land. Will you add your name to our petition to prove to them we have your support?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rXNSIcrlWv-lLcvNAmwSYUIIiNsCsOehJ3FYUpni_PI=/Ps4PPFqrrIkhvQvxw4T8GzRPHg1RcGekx7TMyuRfyzw=?gpsid=39_132_19654&ms=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210708_jipa_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

name: Monica for Congress
subject: You've got to read this RACIST tweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I'm a Hispanic woman running for Congress as a REPUBLICAN, and I'm here to tell Rep. Cori Bush she has some explaining to do. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_e=fJJXNbx-mPRAydzArkWinduYdmqKpOkJB5f7Vtlq_MjrcMUHpYI8mubu7vKBiDeY-7kGkQxUjRYsXTtS1-VAUIPZRHPG9VOqxOCyDRE8Z_jc75EXdSG1qaZ1O4nQ3zqOAeH9sbIaHhNxMmoP3nnIqg-bsUKR3mrk4VVeoIgO1pWsCHVOp63XJBK_XrdesDLuRREQAfXyAvtng2or075530OZ2n23K6ALrGTZy4HJdbe6dQxdWzrRW-zf8VDBqIx-vzBJXgvB32WlWkYzlL-BaB0YjXyrZPNyxHzBl3UVofw3p0LfRi-xbZAr03S2k14GqD_HXUrwqv4IJYLKiW7HqnrfaETI_jF1K_pCeBv0CxonEiyatGJ6wZYuXtGPEz2sNiDf70oluJNKANPidAb1sAi4iT0Ge7lujUOIIzW0pdX98dvml8Sv-sKT7f82Em8OozO_mAO2xHC5FT-k0l338uMUCQ9WsvJT6tPyfZmce2o%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m a proud Hispanic woman running for Congress in Texas’ 15th congressional district. I’m a small business owner, a mother, a minority, and a proud Republican. **Last year, I came within 6,000 votes of being elected the first Hispanic Republican elected to the U.S. House from South Texas**.

I believe in the value of hard work. I believe in funding our border patrol and our police. I believe that the United States of America while imperfect, is still the envy of the world.

So, when I read a tweet by Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri on the 4th of July, I wondered aloud how anyone could possibly believe what this woman had to say. See her tweet below.

I say this to Rep. Bush. I live on the border.**I was raised on the border. In my lifetime, I’ve seen hundreds of thousands - maybe even millions of immigrants - attempt to gain entry to the United States.** Why? Because the United States is still the best hope for the world’s destitute and those who want to live in a nation that is consistently striving to be a better version of its collective self.

If you agree with me that we need more Republicans of minority descent in the House to help paint a narrative that celebrates America, rather than tear it down like Miss Bush’s, **[would you consider a gift to my campaign today of $50, $25 or even just $5?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_e=fJJXNbx-mPRAydzArkWinduYdmqKpOkJB5f7Vtlq_MjrcMUHpYI8mubu7vKBiDeY-7kGkQxUjRYsXTtS1-VAUIPZRHPG9VOqxOCyDRE8Z_jc75EXdSG1qaZ1O4nQ3zqOAeH9sbIaHhNxMmoP3nnIqg-bsUKR3mrk4VVeoIgO1pWsCHVOp63XJBK_XrdesDLuRREQAfXyAvtng2or075530OZ2n23K6ALrGTZy4HJdbe6dQxdWzrRW-zf8VDBqIx-vzBJXgvB32WlWkYzlL-BaK-FhY37T-dxYZ1lSDhnlkDKkHCIuV_9k0NKueJtvCj59pNMVj_SabzMAniNjZBLy1HcUlnjhqHjO9TD5A14zZq_K7jQxxeQ-w7naGazmaf75hLefgtn6YUlUlf26ttRsGoww0i873a_Pjy9n8m2PbqmtO7d6C2apbJobxdHOEW8shMAURwHmoBL_qSFo09Aa0KoL3m9CVYrFCGDpKRRw-4%3D)**

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_e=fJJXNbx-mPRAydzArkWinduYdmqKpOkJB5f7Vtlq_MjrcMUHpYI8mubu7vKBiDeY-7kGkQxUjRYsXTtS1-VAUIPZRHPG9VOqxOCyDRE8Z_jc75EXdSG1qaZ1O4nQ3zqOAeH9sbIaHhNxMmoP3nnIqg-bsUKR3mrk4VVeoIgO1pWsCHVOp63XJBK_XrdesDLuRREQAfXyAvtng2or075530OZ2n23K6ALrGTZy4HJdbe6dQxdWzrRW-zf8VDBqIx-vzBJXgvB32WlWkYzlL-BaNJWTmsDWClRw30RNmC7gnMXpTJRagJS_OdIXS4Tr3nGuMvmpr9uiwn1yUHccT79bAxtG9fzXv8cNR50I89hsxEnT_Rj29Bz9UKpDSNe07hdh9Lfh9goDphBToWD9Tk_4zGABgGN72JmJY4XTCjyE29lE-1sB5NsVoj_qBiBp3tEfd6CJsvvS-6YGxFCxkRJfAsKGTa1cN0T1AHF7TQ0xyY%3D)
As a child of a single mother, I’m here to tell you that the American dream is alive and well, Fellow patriot. I can’t speak to the motives behind this woman’s tweet but I can tell you this: **words have consequences, and our adversaries are constantly on the lookout for ammunition to use against us, to weaken our democracy.**

If I’m fortunate enough to be elected to Congress, you can bet your bottom dollar that I won’t let words like Rep. Bush’s go unchecked. **[I’d march right down to the House floor and call her out for this crass lie that she’s pushing that America isn’t free](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_e=fJJXNbx-mPRAydzArkWinduYdmqKpOkJB5f7Vtlq_MjrcMUHpYI8mubu7vKBiDeY-7kGkQxUjRYsXTtS1-VAUIPZRHPG9VOqxOCyDRE8Z_jc75EXdSG1qaZ1O4nQ3zqOAeH9sbIaHhNxMmoP3nnIqg-bsUKR3mrk4VVeoIgO1pWsCHVOp63XJBK_XrdesDLuRREQAfXyAvtng2or075530OZ2n23K6ALrGTZy4HJdbe6dQxdWzrRW-zf8VDBqIx-vzBJXgvB32WlWkYzlL-BaK6V5cUjbt2oDA25dLzQaUh5mqGSYCzQNp7LAz0VE1PLpDf7LOIbM7QMN7JCIaWIbNpNZXEiBA-oyQmXsUBOsdlEJwRdDWDZZuScCzCyP_Iji4yYkkubkCNWS0Jok_k_gnqjAq5v25DtaXJE1fhYtazhEuasD85Tmva4Eu9oG6mg3q5hOjC2zqORbZKoWeSqsl6vkKYABpJS0WSYeyv-Veo%3D)**.

If Rep. Bush wants to make a visit to the border so she can see just how many people are eager to get into the country, and to learn why - then here is her invitation.**I’m happy to translate for her. I think the response may surprise her**.

**I’ll leave off here, and I sincerely hope Rep. Bush sees this**. Thank you, dear Lord, for allowing me to live in this great country we call the USA, where no matter your background, race, or religion, you can do or be anything you dream. **It may not be easy and sometimes** , and it won’t be fair, but in this great nation and with God - **anything is possible**.

We need members of Congress who still believe in and embody the American Dream. If you agree with that statement, **[I hope you’ll consider a gift to my campaign right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_e=fJJXNbx-mPRAydzArkWinduYdmqKpOkJB5f7Vtlq_MjrcMUHpYI8mubu7vKBiDeY-7kGkQxUjRYsXTtS1-VAUIPZRHPG9VOqxOCyDRE8Z_jc75EXdSG1qaZ1O4nQ3zqOAeH9sbIaHhNxMmoP3nnIqg-bsUKR3mrk4VVeoIgO1pWsCHVOp63XJBK_XrdesDLuRREQAfXyAvtng2or075530OZ2n23K6ALrGTZy4HJdbe6dQxdWzrRW-zf8VDBqIx-vzBJXgvB32WlWkYzlL-BaJhMGOagDycTbtSmwx559k4pxOLNzddu2B6_tRQfZ4Z2D2ureoTHWW2k_FqcYkyRDmfKcGqASUqoYdDY3dqRel0Y0Lt4qaNfioxOeh9jzjyb6VtBvfPHSjw0SsuwL7nu44ZV5BYjokLfwWtjsfKMldp8XEh3hv0RAaLp-Z9DguUH9jZFrYK4Y0idXj44LIjMWgJl1DRpA4ZrNdwYo4y2l9o%3D)**.

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_e=fJJXNbx-mPRAydzArkWinduYdmqKpOkJB5f7Vtlq_MjrcMUHpYI8mubu7vKBiDeY-7kGkQxUjRYsXTtS1-VAUIPZRHPG9VOqxOCyDRE8Z_jc75EXdSG1qaZ1O4nQ3zqOAeH9sbIaHhNxMmoP3nnIqg-bsUKR3mrk4VVeoIgO1pWsCHVOp63XJBK_XrdesDLuRREQAfXyAvtng2or075530OZ2n23K6ALrGTZy4HJdbe6dQxdWzrRW-zf8VDBqIx-vzBJXgvB32WlWkYzlL-BaJ96RYKXS5PJX3rN8ojCtqPBq0PHe5pDp8RBO4GY9LxK6k-5TFhvfdyL01FeUnZgrgxNIKi9Fnpwin5G5tBjCYUjc_xMN8V0s--14LvytLGV_ffdGx3ro28zuQSwGhV0NFGDakqnkrQd_K4YZWR_qt_wJwJ5jB723NfiXaoA3PPnJfNT7Siiv8CdJ7hswsAd71N31OR7uFOEkT1TQMH-hAE%3D)

Thank you for your time

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
---

[Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=a176b838777047afa4cbeb09fe27378a&_t=Bd618NMq7ScdFm1Kll10LGxa-CT96MBipTpeHn_s7BJn9UsdtuavFG17Zs4XOJ6kpYQFykpC39RCDbBUVZ1tjTOMFt2tI7m8z13GwGZ76b2gu7bgfvU1C3bAxKyLYcuWvVBBNT_S-DIlh-95ub5p5FdzPUKGTCJ_hm96pX0ew-0%3D)

subject: Not going to sugarcoat it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
We're not going to sugarcoat it, friend. Maggie is the most vulnerable incumbent Democrat up for reelection. In 2016, she won by only 1,017 votes, and in 2022, it may be even closer. With Senate control split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat, and Mitch McConnell is laser-focused on New Hampshire. In the Senate, Maggie has helped protect health care for millions of Americans, secure pandemic relief, lower prescription drug costs, and more. We need to reelect Maggie to the Senate so she can continue her fight for hard-working New Hampshire families. But right now the Granite State is being flooded with dark money and false attack ads. In a swing state like New Hampshire, letting these attacks go unanswered could tip the scales. **[Will you help us hold on to this critical seat by donating today? body:
My first priority in the U.S. Senate has always been to be a voice for Washington state. So before Congress starts a busy and important work period next week, I wanted to take a moment and get your input.
#
I want to hear directly from you, Peter.
My first priority in the U.S. Senate has always been to be a voice for Washington state. So before Congress starts a busy and important work period next week, I wanted to take a moment and get your input.
**[Take my quick survey to tell me what issues are most important to you, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32093410/294696658/1469521884?ms=pm_em_210708_1&refcode=pm_em_210708_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzBkNGM1MC0zOWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lEwPhyxErczMQwVDrty9BArtFhdKSws6q2phcKAF4o=&emci=c20d4c50-39e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c70d4c50-39e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**

Patty

clean_body: Maya Angelou famously said, “when someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.” | | | = | | Derek, Maya Angelou famously said, “when someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.” In a new undercover video, Glenn Youngkin showed us exactly who he is. In the video, Youngkin told a young woman he won’t talk publicly about his extreme anti-abortion stance because he doesn’t want to scare independent voters. Derek, Youngkin’s admission should terrify women who care about making their own health care decisions and doing what’s best for their families. If Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he will ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. Virginia families are counting on us to stop that from happening. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With a conservative super-majority on the Supreme Court, it’s more important than ever for governors to be staunch defenders of the right to reproductive health care. Derek, that’s exactly who Terry McAuliffe will be. As Governor, Terry stood as a brick wall as extreme Republicans repeatedly tried to pass bills to restrict abortion rights and defund Planned Parenthood. With a conservative Supreme Court poised to strike down Roe v. Wade, the Governor is the last line of defense against attacks on abortion rights. We absolutely can't let Glenn Youngkin be that person. = Thanks in advance, Cecile Richards = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: THIS is the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Why are Senate Democrats giving McConnell veto power over the Democratic agenda?
#
Peter,
**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell bragged that, “100% of our focus is on stopping this new administration.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-445&t=1&refcode2=445_420207_KkJBum&akid=445%2E420207%2EKkJBum)
**THEN:** He admitted ON VIDEO that the state he represents is going to get a huge influx of relief money from the Democrats’ American Rescue Plan. And he kindly added that not a single Republican voted for it! Why not, Mitch?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-445&t=2&refcode2=445_420207_KkJBum&akid=445%2E420207%2EKkJBum)
It’s clear: Mitch McConnell has no interest in helping the working people of this country. So, why are Senate Democrats giving McConnell veto power over our popular and urgent agenda?
**NOW:** Senate Democrats must immediately end the filibuster and take power away from McConnell’s minority. It’s the only way that we can pass a big, bold, transformative agenda for economic, social, racial, and environmental justice. It’s the only way that we can DELIVER for the people.
[**Stand with Pramila and join her in the fight to end the filibuster right now with a $3 donation. Pramila doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so she’s relying on your support to take on McConnell and the obstructionist GOP.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-445&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=445_420207_KkJBum&akid=445%2E420207%2EKkJBum)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-445&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=445_420207_KkJBum&akid=445%2E420207%2EKkJBum)**
Republicans have already blocked the creation of a January 6 Commission to investigate the deadly insurrection. They did it to protect fellow Republicans like Ted Cruz and Donald Trump. McConnell also blocked the For The People Act, a historic voting rights bill that we need ASAP. They did that so state legislatures across the country can keep passing dangerous voter suppression laws.
Some critical legislation may not even get a vote in the Senate because of the filibuster! The House has passed bills like the Equality Act, gun safety legislation, the PRO Act, the DREAM Act, D.C. Statehood, and so much more that is stuck in the Senate because Democrats won’t end the filibuster.
**It’s time that we take power away from Mitch McConnell:[Chip in $3 or whatever you can today to fuel Pramila’s fight to end the filibuster and deliver transformative change in this country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-445&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=445_420207_KkJBum&akid=445%2E420207%2EKkJBum)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210708-445-footer&t=24&refcode2=445_420207_KkJBum&akid=445%2E420207%2EKkJBum)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: Don’t let Tax Hike Tony win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58405342:sXnw3JdNd:m:1:2068296031:12AFEE382A2B551D6C7ABA0C727C4ADD:r)
Friend,

Thanks to the help of grassroots activists like you, we pressured Tony Evers into signing Republicans' historic budget that puts Wisconsin families first -- but now, **Evers is also trying to take credit for Republicans ' transformational tax cut after he originally tried to raise taxes by **[**$1 billion**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58405343:sXnw3JdNd:m:1:2068296031:12AFEE382A2B551D6C7ABA0C727C4ADD:r)**.**

As Chairman Andrew Hitt said in our [press release](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58405344:sXnw3JdNd:m:1:2068296031:12AFEE382A2B551D6C7ABA0C727C4ADD:r) today: "Tony Evers tried to raise taxes by $1 billion in his proposed budget, so it is laughable that he is now taking credit for Republicans' tax cut. We applaud Wisconsin Republicans for putting forward a historic budget with transformative tax cuts that will put more money in the pockets of Wisconsin families despite Tony Evers' tax increase."

**We know that Evers is going to try to campaign on Republicans ' hard work to cut taxes for middle-class Wisconsinites, but we can't let him rewrite history.** We are already ramping up our efforts to fire Tony Evers in 2022. You can get involved by signing up to [volunteer here](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58405345:sXnw3JdNd:m:1:2068296031:12AFEE382A2B551D6C7ABA0C727C4ADD:r), or reach out to your local [county party directly](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58405346:sXnw3JdNd:m:1:2068296031:12AFEE382A2B551D6C7ABA0C727C4ADD:r). If you don't have time to volunteer, but would like to contribute financially to fund our efforts, click [here](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58405342:sXnw3JdNd:m:1:2068296031:12AFEE382A2B551D6C7ABA0C727C4ADD:r).

Thanks,

body:

subject: Are you with me?
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=499431c9b167484483ec47383e43702f&_e=uwg8AHbkUUAE1w7IstkxhqUdT7KlDXoRjekQ-H6Rl0RSzQchzMfKQq0u0n2k1TM4Dq7gxX1lCPCuyP6ppE3ixBM7FGjCUx-4OchsOP8trFdkTScr3FynNtSp3mUkFhhjob0dynryG3JL3MIdbEb9yuvdU0odLTLM_E4TtWSP1ZQry_LUWRJ3S7mvskMRhkXkHjz6Oua6ad0qvpoMg4XZTb8eIhRBeZkbhdQnHV9VpqnZ_mW1EYaAIxVIK8Eo1fD3Iobw8TgWgT1dlpiwEnpTdmbkdEnPAnslWIvHqKFOvyhIEmM-ktt2XeZdNhSRMhfE) Fellow American,
Over the past few decades, the Left has plotted — and largely succeeded — in taking over our nation’s most sacred institutions.
_Today, anti-America forces control what students learn in our nation’s schools, what students see on TV and social media, what they read in newspapers and hear about the world, and so much more. _
The last year has compounded this toxic reality and shaken our nation to its core.
Between the coronavirus, ANTIFA mobs destroying our cities, the controversial 2020 election, corrupt government, oppressive big tech, and “woke” cancel culture — the need to win America’s Culture War is more urgent now than ever.
**_It’s time we reclaim OUR COUNTRY!_**
**[At Turning Point USA, my team and I are reclaiming our nation from radical forces who hate America, hate our values, and hate anyone who dares to stand up to them. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898470:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898471:J4cw_3lNp:m:1:3253819041:8031FE82B82A52235B5ADCD9603EF452:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Charlie Crist
subject: How you can help support the Surfside community
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | Friend,

My heart broke when I learned that emergency workers at the collapsed Champlain Towers building in Surfside have moved from rescuing residents to recovery. As of today, 60 Floridians have lost their lives in this unspeakable tragedy -- and 80 remain missing.

My prayers are with the residents of Champlain Towers, their families, and the emergency workers working around the clock. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9yuOXdxEUX3rXH5_Fauydw==/k_Et5XT-OysonAWh5HBbDg==)
---
**[The Coral Gables Community Foundation, the Miami Foundation, and the Key Biscayne Community Foundation have created a relief fund for those impacted by this disaster. If you're able, will you make a donation to their efforts?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9yuOXdxEUX3rXH5_Fauydw==/k_Et5XT-OysonAWh5HBbDg==)**

I also support a federal probe into the building collapse. We must get to the bottom of what happened and why, so this tragedy never happens again.

**[If you're able, please consider making a contribution to the Support Surfside Fund.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9yuOXdxEUX3rXH5_Fauydw==/k_Et5XT-OysonAWh5HBbDg==)**

Take care and God bless,
Charlie Crist

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

name: Jim Banks, Chairman
subject: I went to the border with President Trump, and here’s what I saw:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
Fellow Conservative, **_Here’s what I learned from my recent trip to the Southern border with President Trump:_** There are a **RECORD** amount of illegal border crossings under the Biden administration, due mostly to the open border policies that the Democratic Party espouses. _**Over 1 million arrests have been made this year and we are on pace to have the most border apprehensions name: Greg Stanton
subject: voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Hi there,

Last week, the Supreme Court handed down a decision further limiting the scope of the Voting Rights Act--at a time when state legislatures across the country are passing **more repressive voting laws**.

This much is clear: Congress needs to act NOW to **reinvigorate the Voting Rights Act**.

[_**Join my call by adding your name to our petition >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/CuD1ZUGDxmipgdgzTwaPM8c3Nm8CXeUuPhNWwqaT02k=/iRN30DDAQBwpFv26IvL6fwE2JgPu4FhKLG2UrvEQRiM=)

---

Voting should be easy, safe, and accessible for _everyone _who is legally qualified to vote.

By restoring and strengthening the Voting Rights Act, Congress can prevent voting regulations that unfairly burden communities of color. This is how we **protect our democracy:** by making sure everyone has an equal chance to make their voice heard.

[_**Will you help me fight voter suppression by signing on now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/CuD1ZUGDxmipgdgzTwaPM8c3Nm8CXeUuPhNWwqaT02k=/iRN30DDAQBwpFv26IvL6fwE2JgPu4FhKLG2UrvEQRiM=)

Thank you!

\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: FLASH POLL: Critical race theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by CLIENT INFO |
body:
so I need to hear directly from you... [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=53e91f0b60d348d1b60fe555f96e53c9&_e=7-Hm0vllK9Pe54TutoDrZFQXYBapeMHm0CATlfXBWd9-RrNNTjL1oGQt7i9CRNbUg4oBCtQQIlvfOAdFlJ5WtQk0-tieup2wk3aF39FA3Az8pqsATSrquC2QCKT98QQ1K1vdhlFjiw8BjQIA_sneo1MPg-pGtTuSUM1HtG5emHsyjerkc9lHNKkKF3IWorJqgZ9HYvXFvs3kQK5LdhLvNTan03wK-L-lbJ5u0KxhJuDppuVBgDk_hMojYPeruTND69ly4gQFA_IUqLBN-u286lufHhVWPHUMFZd6XePi8XumAS4bfbsQzoItFdXRBSqniNjc6VIUwp-M6gkyJFIyKEoDOaCbAnpUiRTCogD_jkAzkQRr9CdAb5Nxg1yBWbk0cSfur_0OZ1BWsehOlVyJgBjsQxFkQgH52F-jccPwxdc%3D) | |
---
Peter,

We keep hearing from the media that opposition to teaching critical race theory in our schools is only coming from a handful of people and special interest groups, and that opposition to it is not widespread. But as you know, it's almost impossible to trust what you hear from a lot of the media, so I need to hear directly from you...

**[Do you oppose the teaching of critical race theory in our schools?](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=53e91f0b60d348d1b60fe555f96e53c9&_e=7-Hm0vllK9Pe54TutoDrZFQXYBapeMHm0CATlfXBWd9-RrNNTjL1oGQt7i9CRNbUg4oBCtQQIlvfOAdFlJ5WtQk0-tieup2wk3aF39FA3Az8pqsATSrquC2QCKT98QQ1K1vdhlFjiw8BjQIA_sneo1MPg-pGtTuSUM1HtG5emHsyjerkc9lHNKkKF3IWorJqgZ9HYvXFvs3kQK5LdhLvNQnZfNWGVYN9yzeW7ix7Of5--KsEF1GeYLBCcdblmRazcjrU9m0v0joKiFvrDpnWLwUV485-FOCiymADfz-qtGi0iCzTnT1xhBBOY1lLNix6bYFDoVnbHO2bFjdhXp5-A_ou2hDohCNLgxXMlTySRanaQ3liiHqxrONEgXC1cgS6B5HYV1pRh3uWKqrCHQ7-QHmty84F6U-lcLOPaHhZrh4%3D)**
[**YES**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=53e91f0b60d348d1b60fe555f96e53c9&_e=7-Hm0vllK9Pe54TutoDrZFQXYBapeMHm0CATlfXBWd9-RrNNTjL1oGQt7i9CRNbUg4oBCtQQIlvfOAdFlJ5WtQk0-tieup2wk3aF39FA3Az8pqsATSrquC2QCKT98QQ1K1vdhlFjiw8BjQIA_sneo1MPg-pGtTuSUM1HtG5emHsyjerkc9lHNKkKF3IWorJqgZ9HYvXFvs3kQK5LdhLvNYWihovPixqyifN7tXAFvuTtqsCqGf5TOH7VSsHGUEwfOGKxCpMjLf8PuPYYYjxDk0rJ7ypDplN9ZEpQjd8_r7ptqqGxHk0EGpCsmNhi98BCzssqLNo5X3TnWRgac2b2sDYoFYOrcGstePDJ_rv0S7X-4tZq_se_LnJ7h5LaU19dEOjZlkKlTnS3HAic3PbQM92s5gYh6mOZRcnx9hbxz0o%3D)
[**NO**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=53e91f0b60d348d1b60fe555f96e53c9&_e=7-Hm0vllK9Pe54TutoDrZFQXYBapeMHm0CATlfXBWd9-RrNNTjL1oGQt7i9CRNbUg4oBCtQQIlvfOAdFlJ5WtQk0-tieup2wk3aF39FA3Az8pqsATSrquC2QCKT98QQ1K1vdhlFjiw8BjQIA_sneo1MPg-pGtTuSUM1HtG5emHsyjerkc9lHNKkKF3IWorJqgZ9HYvXFvs3kQK5LdhLvNfIeTA5I_xlVE9lqHFYWuj-XK9C3jvNC8oMzotsY0uCVxVHIh6646_UhsndDdCJiaGUN8u5kPJqYXTmusxZTn7GHpySJUUqzeGQFSmO948EyMKZsEfRWFP6VeA5NtImKMFa62HGj22i1s56J8l8_0iXJ7n4JSdX9PwydbuS3BJF6yZ8rN2zmdQ_1_JFf79ax4X5VU_D8EA0rdDwkBjsOE24%3D)
As governor, I will be responsive to what voters want - not what the media says. It's important I hear directly from you.

Thank you,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders
[**FLASH POLL >>**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=53e91f0b60d348d1b60fe555f96e53c9&_e=7-Hm0vllK9Pe54TutoDrZFQXYBapeMHm0CATlfXBWd9-RrNNTjL1oGQt7i9CRNbUg4oBCtQQIlvfOAdFlJ5WtQk0-tieup2wk3aF39FA3Az8pqsATSrquC2QCKT98QQ1K1vdhlFjiw8BjQIA_sneo1MPg-pGtTuSUM1HtG5emHsyjerkc9lHNKkKF3IWorJqgZ9HYvXFvs3kQK5LdhLvNQkQsEoqB38FANW0o85A40CtxZ7c9O-kUF7UbBz1Nbe4i6FWD9ja4lop2iqtGrsLXdJh7dnCLHTHn71EHVijn5DqhW9dr8lVDTOLZyGB93XAG9XN2I7co-wlOUfe6eil3969NXHR9HO2E02Rnky4vJjEtvOnwi0-iScKYVMWFRNMWc8kzT7-IYESQDmcL3sDEm7PrnXR2U4JPRaAFP02rSQ%3D)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Gangbanger Awarded Asylum at 13 Under Obama Program Guilty of Machete Murder
body:
An illegal immigrant gangbanger who entered the country as a kid under an Obama open borders initiative has plead guilty to the brutal machete murder of a New York teen.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | July 08, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56143&L=25312&F=H&)
---
# [Gangbanger Awarded Asylum at 13 Under Obama Program Guilty of Machete Murder](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56143&L=25312&F=H&)
An illegal immigrant gangbanger who entered the country as a kid under an Obama open borders initiative has plead guilty to the brutal machete murder of a New York teen. The native of El Salvador, Samuel Ponce, came to the U.S. at the age of 13 as part of a program that has welcomed hundreds of thousands of mostly Central American minors via the Mexican border. The government classifies them as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) and most come from Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador. The number of UAC in U.S. custody more than doubled in the last few months following a big drop during the Trump administration and the government is currently housing more than 21,000. President Trump tried to control the damage with an order instructing federal agents to stop giving minors special protections when they are processed. In the first few months of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Trump administration expelled nearly 9,000 migrant children under an emergency health order.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56143&L=25312&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Department of Justice Treats Jan. 6 Detainees With Double Standard: Conservative Legal Activists ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56143&L=25313&F=H&) The Epoch Times “Generally speaking, it looks like the targets of the Justice Department investigation on Jan. 6 are being treated differently from others who committed similar acts,” Fitton told The Epoch Times Tuesday. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56143&L=25314&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3Mvanctc3Vlcy1kb2ovP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDgyMDI0NTk=)

clean_body: An illegal immigrant gangbanger who entered the country as a kid under an Obama open borders initiative has plead guilty to the brutal machete murder of a New York teen. | | | Because no one is above the law! | July 08, 2021 ---|---|--- | | An illegal immigrant gangbanger who entered the country as a kid under an Obama open borders initiative has plead guilty to the brutal machete murder of a New York teen. The native of El Salvador, Samuel Ponce, came to the U.S. at the age of 13 as part of a program that has welcomed hundreds of thousands of mostly Central American minors via the Mexican border. The government classifies them as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) and most come from Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador. The number of UAC in U.S. custody more than doubled in the last few months following a big drop during the Trump administration and the government is currently housing more than 21,000. President Trump tried to control the damage with an order instructing federal agents to stop giving minors special protections when they are processed. In the first few months of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Trump administration expelled nearly 9,000 migrant children under an emergency health order. | | | == The Epoch Times “Generally speaking, it looks like the targets of the Justice Department investigation on Jan. 6 are being treated differently from others who committed similar acts,” Fitton told The Epoch Times Tuesday. == = The Epoch Times The law enforcement agency’s request, according to Judicial Watch, to the financial institutions was in connection with the federal investigation of the event on Jan. 6 that saw hundreds of protesters enter the U.S. Capitol to protest the November 2020 presidential election’s outcome and vote-counting. = Judicial Watch “We want the details on what looks to be an unprecedented abuse of the financial privacy of countless innocent Americans by big banks and the FBI,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The FBI’s stonewalling and non-denial denial of our request speak volumes.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

subject: It will all come down to Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r) | |
---
Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona.

My race in Congressional District 1 in Arizona will be the **NUMBER #1 BATTLEGROUND RACE** in the country. **[_Learn more about my fight >>_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)
Peter, if we can flip this seat, it will almost guarantee that conservatives Take Back the House in 2022.

But it's not going to be easy.

Democrats are going to throw every dollar they can at this race to take me down.

Peter, this is the part I hate about campaigning. I can't do this alone, and I can't do it without the generous support of grassroots conservatives like yourself.

I'm asking every conservative reading this email to give just **[_$5_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)** to help me continue my fight for our countryー**[ _can I count on your support?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)**
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...
**
**
We don 't believe in burning our flag... **
**
We stand up for our flag! **

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)

|
---
I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:[ https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2488845/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898735:JVWoF3lHN:m:1:3253819041:EACF214456F87E8E4C3F21CB4805B6E4:r)
|

name: Jonathan Soto
subject: A resounding success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AOC’s Homework Helpers program has been a resounding success, thanks to you.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210708-2267-header&t=1&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)
This is Jonathan, an organizer for Team AOC’s Homework Helpers program. As you may remember, our campaign started the Homework Helpers tutoring program over a year ago when the COVID-19 pandemic forced New York City schools to shut down and students transitioned to online learning.
After hearing from families who were struggling to juggle work, childcare, and technology, Alexandria had an idea to do something pretty radical for a congressional campaign (as most others were laser focused on just getting elected). She started this free tutoring program to connect volunteers with students from our community who could use help with their homework. [(You can watch a video about it here)](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-2267-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2267_2526796_gqPDiS&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS).
We’ve been crunching the numbers from our parent/guardian feedback surveys and can confirm that the program has been a resounding success.
Here are some highlights:
* We’ve conducted 2,000+ one-on-one Homework Helper sessions
* Parents and guardians expressed a decrease of concern about their children in the following areas: emotional well-being, fear of falling behind in school and readiness for the fall school year
* Our participant average household income is at $35K a year, meaning that the families we served couldn’t afford to pay for one-on-one tutoring services otherwise
* We served families who spoke the following languages at home: Albanian, Arabic, Bengali, Cantonese, English, Mandarin, Spanish, and Tibetan
* Parents and guardians expressed improvement in their children’s school engagement

So, what’s next from here? Homework Helpers is expanding through the summer. We’re growing our program to include English and Math classes for students, extracurricular activities like art classes and free-lunch programs through cooking courses, and English classes for parents and guardians.
Up until this point, we’ve been able to fund our fall and spring Homework Helpers program thanks to your generous support. **Now, here’s what I need from you: if you can afford it, I am asking you to make a contribution today so we can expand our program and purchase art supplies, classroom materials, fund field trips and expand our technology for our virtual and in-person summer sessions.**
[https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/homework-helpers](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-2267-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2267_2526796_gqPDiS&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)
We’ve decided to expand Homework Helpers because this mutual aid program is at the core of what this movement is about: helping people. Our campaign isn’t just active when it’s a voting year. We use your contributions to help keep these programs available for our communities year-round.
None of this would be possible if it weren’t for the community organizers who put this together and everyday people who stepped up to volunteer a few hours to tutor a student or chip in to our campaign or shop. So many kids have seen leaps in their grades thanks to you and your support. Let’s keep this going. **If you can be part of this work by contributing and helping to expand this special program, here’s that link one more time:**
[https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/homework-helpers](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-2267-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2267_2526796_gqPDiS&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)
I’m so thankful for the people reading this email, the people who make up this movement who are so full of heart and generosity. We’re doing something great together.
Thanks for reading,
Jonathan Soto
Political Organizer
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210708?refcode=em20210708-2267-P&t=5&refcode2=2267_2526796_gqPDiS&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2267%2E2526796%2EgqPDiS)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
