name: Fox News Alert
subject: JD just tore apart Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Protect Ohio Values PAC, ProtectOhioValues
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898769:6vwze3l1N:m:1:3253819041:F1AC82752894354F7E5F70217178B223:r) | |
---
Peter,

As Americans, we have the right to speak freely under the First Amendment.

As parents, we have the right to decide what our kids see, hear, and learn in the schools our tax dollars fund.

**But woke, radical school boards across the country are denying those rights to parents and community members who speak out against the Leftist plague of Critical Race Theory.**

Critical Race Theory tells children that all white children are oppressors, and that all black children are victims. It encourages our kids to judge each other by the color of their skin, and not the content of their character as individuals. There's a simple term for that: racism! And it has NO place in our schools.

JD joined Fox & Friends this week to help expose the dangers of this curriculum and rally parents to FIGHT BACK against the extreme leftist political ideologies poisoning our classrooms.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898769:6vwze3l1N:m:1:3253819041:F1AC82752894354F7E5F70217178B223:r)
**[Watch JD 's interview and support his run for Senate >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898769:6vwze3l1N:m:1:3253819041:F1AC82752894354F7E5F70217178B223:r)**

Peter, this curriculum (which is being funded by Amazon and other Silicon Valley tech giants) teaches that America is an irredeemable, evil, racist nation. It teaches children that we cannot overcome our history and that society is made up of oppressors and the oppressed.

**It 's wrong, it's un-American, and it has no place in our society -- much less our schools.**

_Here 's a snippet of what JD had to say:_

**_" I think that destroying that sense of pride, destroying that sense of _**
**_patriotism makes us easier to control which is why they 're pushing it."_**

Concerned parents in Loudoun County, Virginia were silenced and even _arrested_ for voicing their opposition to this woke agenda just a few days ago. It's proof that we're on the right side of this debate, but we need to stand with them now more than ever to send a message that we're not backing down!

[**Chip in $10 if you agree that we need JD Vance _in_ the U.S. Senate -- and get Critical Race Theory _out_ of our schools! >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57898769:6vwze3l1N:m:1:3253819041:F1AC82752894354F7E5F70217178B223:r)

Thank you,
Protect Ohio Values Team

---

name: Aja Smith
subject: America is NOT racist
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Aja For Congress
body:
Take it from me, a black female American. If America is racist and horrible, then why are you serving in Congress? Why are you choosing to live here? | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3944ff9c822b4ea0a85ac2b3da89c123&_e=zBYsHyRucv9ICVW4Rr8lg7wDjLxXbAxCssp72wBMfN13ZnmoPJhXL_0-EDncoKNn3JEYIQLakYiWEMcZtSrqvZNlX-GTVdACzMr6TBzNvqcDpwtj7Alfn4kTf2kqRq8ISk0GgejDWslmUr1qb0FrDiOz8x-u_uCW0NC-HDdKvXFGgEft9donSGg6CqozbkLDHqi20m3Jrd7a14BaERzUfodQEEX8A-OAwhrXumrGzlfnFMl9uYtIQCEtY8Is-DfU4fWs9eon4inT6u9Kl4KY2kWhC-HmynsMIsbNPa4KqLLKRvh_0u4AmqGvTMBxwLh28mdtWwwyBavVqicMmFgxgW6Vl6iLc5acaR9Edlbl5wxIQH9aaAOf6WPE2QI4WUXXM0VkX5DQMh1U6ekVdRJgxvanJ4DB4xilylfczUuiwuNMBrPSVDWGE3HpBlhjYtL6)
---
Fellow Conservative,

This past weekend, while Americans were proudly celebrating our independence, a radical-Leftist congresswoman from Missouri tweeted out a disgustingly un-American message. _Take a look for yourself..._

I have been afforded the opportunity to be a contributing member of this great nation, just the same as white men and women today. We are so privileged to live in America where everyone has opportunities and freedom! Rep. Bush is forgetting that some of the most successful people in America ARE BLACK; Lebron James, Oprah Winfrey, Denzel Washington, Serena Williams, and Kanye West,just to name a few. name: John Castorani
subject: 23,328 American flags on order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
I'm raising funds to send 50,000 American flags to the Olympic athlete who turned her back on Old Glory, and just two weeks left to reach our goal.For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=4a28a39a6c31432fa2e7019865b9ce9f&_t=N5i080yAzKyQuIqPxWjVRd-ZMP6FYAZuhl8i-Lzz8_Y8_zPqjheXZATwYl-QCXDUtWaztIFn5mHao0UL-nybZTSInivteFqj8mAwXH_UC55rmPwnTl6QC-mnNZcReKQjhhqkgC74RxOCxhQy-tPeFkd-wjWFWLwbL2U1yvmT6DM%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4a28a39a6c31432fa2e7019865b9ce9f&_e=uHfO1s04JAxOpIo-9J8xUNbMaGUv6Jb4CVZRMNnic0-fAoCBGJcrsfwOTP22TL_ApXy_RvLhWUaGSGwXRZe8HYAuoitXxdkiK1hL8mBtxNhGP8E9usbFWvBpMl1hOCh30V7ZgDl8XNPvikzOobrWxdnswPlmX2TbnbR9DKCqSB8swLN2USTQ-k-xj3K9K2yNumVs87Rqtd2iE_d3fTLvqk4KsL6IsbspRwSjFfpJ6f_0pbG0ioTrUYGtPm4ToHFKifKlN5xQqMvf8KeRArpK84BMc98xrR1w0nHPZEFlAd1ngY4c59iPGCR2sdJ7rfV9GZuCADdle6cTOaErTf0ZxK3fxBHSSrVZknzZwK4ZPbdxa1DiXLyAnjjggas-pi-UfEgdRAPBg59VaZs9O8OpRqOD6hKDtaK7FRj6TP8spi0Ta2XRMPyflL5FdPrji7tjg7_W9tPH48sEvHotdIS49AP0dq9cn0Nhfz_RTBSylQoI8ieAYjgVEjeldetYa-lO)
---

Fellow Conservative,

On June 26th during Olympic trials in Oregon, Olympic athlete Gwen Berry turned her back in protest to the American flag; in protest to the free-market society that has allowed her and 300 million + Americans to live lives of privilege. **That didn’t sit well with me** , and I imagine if you’re reading this today, it wouldn’t sit well with you either.

For 11 years, I proudly wore the American flag on my arm as a member of the Army’s Special Operations Command. During each of my seven deployments, Old Glory was a constant companion; every morning that I woke up, **the American flag was one of the first things I set my eyes on** – at the end of the day, our flag was one of the last things I would look at before going to sleep.

I wore the stars and stripes proudly for six years as my team and I hunted the Islamic terrorists who attacked the American compound in **Benghazi** and killed Ambassador Chris Stevens, along with three other American personnel.

I’m a proud American, veteran, Republican candidate for Congress in Virginia. And **I’m pissed off**.

That’s why last week I hatched the idea to send as many mini-American flags to the U.S. Olympic Committee that money can buy in Gwen Berry’s name. **So far, we’ve raised $10,000 toward that effort, which will buy 23,328 flags if I buy them in bulk**. But with two weeks until the Olympic opening ceremony, I’m thinking why not try to send **50,000** flags?
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4a28a39a6c31432fa2e7019865b9ce9f&_e=uHfO1s04JAxOpIo-9J8xUNbMaGUv6Jb4CVZRMNnic0-fAoCBGJcrsfwOTP22TL_ApXy_RvLhWUaGSGwXRZe8HYAuoitXxdkiK1hL8mBtxNhGP8E9usbFWvBpMl1hOCh30V7ZgDl8XNPvikzOobrWxdnswPlmX2TbnbR9DKCqSB8swLN2USTQ-k-xj3K9K2yNumVs87Rqtd2iE_d3fTLvqk4KsL6IsbspRwSjFfpJ6f_0pbG0ioTrUYGtPm4ToHFKifKlN5xQqMvf8KeRArpK8wunsLG0VzZQ2XHgFvSuGNWFi5yhq_30LyaMBV60CCCE7SYB085uWOorTvnAoPdmsCrWc9uCMFehrSmP4d14QQWist7Mpq1JvnRAuSLj_w-RXyPyWSiJJL_RfdKjGrtgK-IBviE1HH67zt56lcfSGi5D_W8V6NFVjNeUFrm_knTsZsDTpJdvUVCl5lULVJ8uiEn3wDerwfUGqKZAAjqOIyZcqbiHDoBW80dIFPHlUe5T) _Gwen Berry turning her back to the American flag following Olympic trials on June 26th_

We’ll need to raise another $10,000 over the next two weeks, and to that end I’m hoping you’ll make a donation of $5 or more today. **[For every donation of $5 or more to my congressional campaign, I’ll send an American Flag to anti-American Olympic Athlete in your name](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4a28a39a6c31432fa2e7019865b9ce9f&_e=uHfO1s04JAxOpIo-9J8xUNbMaGUv6Jb4CVZRMNnic0-fAoCBGJcrsfwOTP22TL_ApXy_RvLhWUaGSGwXRZe8HYAuoitXxdkiK1hL8mBtxNhGP8E9usbFWvBpMl1hOCh30V7ZgDl8XNPvikzOobrWxdnswPlmX2TbnbR9DKCqSB8swLN2USTQ-k-xj3K9K2yNumVs87Rqtd2iE_d3fTLvqk4KsL6IsbspRwSjFfpJ6f_0pbG0ioTrUYGtPm4ToHFKifKlN5xQqMvf8KeRArpK86MATiuUn2elHEL2bry2H10orzxtkEKCDUkEmA1JAcaVtHCIwjUnHMU5MxxlwMTaGVeWNrauiKVJFvN1iw2rguNRCh7ZE11ng--G9vhQAA4Hk04GHQD2K_-ajm1Rsu1Psihvzd1lnrf9-kpsrHGnXdG7-6jhT5LnPHVzI6XPTxOTUUKVhMiEfKVsjAqbAJc5BdM31_GXKhBiDeoA0NHyZV4GnUbqL32EA2hbYyepODAK)**.

The United States is far from a perfect country, but we’re a country constantly in a state of improvement. Imagine if an athlete from China pulled such a stunt? They would be arrested
| [**STAND WITH ME AND OLD GLORY
SEND A FLAG TO GWEN BERRY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4a28a39a6c31432fa2e7019865b9ce9f&_e=uHfO1s04JAxOpIo-9J8xUNbMaGUv6Jb4CVZRMNnic0-fAoCBGJcrsfwOTP22TL_ApXy_RvLhWUaGSGwXRZe8HYAuoitXxdkiK1hL8mBtxNhGP8E9usbFWvBpMl1hOCh30V7ZgDl8XNPvikzOobrWxdnswPlmX2TbnbR9DKCqSB8swLN2USTQ-k-xj3K9K2yNumVs87Rqtd2iE_d3fTLvqk4KsL6IsbspRwSjFfpJ6f_0pbG0ioTrUYGtPm4ToHFKifKlN5xQqMvf8KeRArpK8zBgSoana7QFGfMXPOcwvKUPE8c4WcUb8KRdfSvo_u25Fkf00nBSBfLGC5xRJC7xGcNn5o8fjWQsIzeyXxxu-qNT2clfD0XmkOxo9VkUYxAZVqsSa43hdpTnQ6UsrkyzsL3KMQzrghcYrcoG8KQJi6MNPB0wjFf4weJt9pCcwFCy7p5H6J-YcY9bSlI92NlTbIv-D00wJvULg98XCFZaHmLlj_ZN9p6F7oHMUJFx3Dde)
---

I’ll leave you with one last thought today. I worked alongside the FBIs Hostage Recovery team to recover a US citizen being held captive in the African country of Uganda, and I can only imagine the pure sense of joy and relief the individual experienced when they caught a glimpse of the American flag on our right arms and heard the words “**We’re from the United States, and we’re here to take you home.** ”

Gwen Berry should be so fortunate to wear our American flag to the Olympics. Let’s make sure she know’s that Americans are proud of what Old Glory stands for, and we stand tall _**AND**_ proud.

**[I hope you’ll consider a donation of $5 or more to my campaign today in support of my goal to send 50,000 American flags to this “activist athlete.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4a28a39a6c31432fa2e7019865b9ce9f&_e=uHfO1s04JAxOpIo-9J8xUNbMaGUv6Jb4CVZRMNnic0-fAoCBGJcrsfwOTP22TL_ApXy_RvLhWUaGSGwXRZe8HYAuoitXxdkiK1hL8mBtxNhGP8E9usbFWvBpMl1hOCh30V7ZgDl8XNPvikzOobrWxdnswPlmX2TbnbR9DKCqSB8swLN2USTQ-k-xj3K9K2yNumVs87Rqtd2iE_d3fTLvqk4KsL6IsbspRwSjFfpJ6f_0pbG0ioTrUYGtPm4ToHFKifKlN5xQqMvf8KeRArpK80l78NTqlNhPtZbgaNPsjphcIRvcGTQKg2p3SMDg4EjXLcveNiSUduzGEcC6unOpL_4q2H3O7YbTIpELJSbmWfpILjORvzvygKVmDIKSO7-6SG_CHwj-W8g9TcYsWbd3W6fLZYpuV8Y8kS3QS55ui7voDSVgxNNZpihNnpxCTWpZGe_CfA_VD78zHgkespipF_6ny0-qrMhWubQy3tbnaOQaNdoK591sHZgridjpwuhS)** ”

clean_body: I'm raising funds to send 50,000 American flags to the Olympic athlete who turned her back on Old Glory, and just two weeks left to reach our goal.For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, On June 26th during Olympic trials in Oregon, Olympic athlete Gwen Berry turned her back in protest to the American flag; in protest to the free-market society that has allowed her and 300 million + Americans to live lives of privilege. That didn’t sit well with me , and I imagine if you’re reading this today, it wouldn’t sit well with you either. For 11 years, I proudly wore the American flag on my arm as a member of the Army’s Special Operations Command. During each of my seven deployments, Old Glory was a constant companion; every morning that I woke up, the American flag was one of the first things I set my eyes on – at the end of the day, our flag was one of the last things I would look at before going to sleep. I wore the stars and stripes proudly for six years as my team and I hunted the Islamic terrorists who attacked the American compound in Benghazi and killed Ambassador Chris Stevens, along with three other American personnel. I’m a proud American, veteran, Republican candidate for Congress in Virginia. And I’m pissed off. That’s why last week I hatched the idea to send as many mini-American flags to the U.S. Olympic Committee that money can buy in Gwen Berry’s name. So far, we’ve raised $10,000 toward that effort, which will buy 23,328 flags if I buy them in bulk. But with two weeks until the Olympic opening ceremony, I’m thinking why not try to send 50,000 flags? Gwen Berry turning her back to the American flag following Olympic trials on June 26th We’ll need to raise another $10,000 over the next two weeks, and to that end I’m hoping you’ll make a donation of $5 or more today. . The United States is far from a perfect country, but we’re a country constantly in a state of improvement. Imagine if an athlete from China pulled such a stunt? subject: I am forced to speak out

body:
How did ‘Big Tech’ welcome me to the political arena? Twitter to censor a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=be0b22c84e0a4a1c889a265914aebb6b&_e=MIWlsX75oWULGQku8AwhY2mo_UxkvCkqCrSHqRL6RiErJTaUWFapw6EjoWMg-JTbh8ZeKWzROZA20s5zJeeOofjfeqdT8dv7oiK_Lr_CU3TM5__3G-EA2XHXHxXoMz5wkrqLe7dWmRoQRU_U84UmInMRMOthX3m11A4COeAD_ThOSsk1O5wj9lusaCdIj82zZzgDFzn2By16Ofa9d8S-gMN-a6KLEmxxElLLwCvayTsnaSMxLNOMH2Sf_uHs_xuLhPhPDFWUrh7Yb2RaRNNGbdY4cQc10_uAASz7_7LLFa925bJuoty9oBS0uf9XMbX3ZKaYQ1cGMumZIzqXNlP2zgrPaOkqIqEy2PwOQKsWToNLkRcYeu-B8CCS1uond7nnUzQYcop5gd2AgbjgTR55KTI8UbNps6OCuioasMtou9sfrGAchL_bklNq0CPrN4Xb75l0roOUloUColEo4FfAMg%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

My campaign kick-off plan was focused on my career as an Army Officer serving our nation in Operation Enduring Freedom and how my service was tragically cut short when I was severely wounded and nearly killed by a roadside IED.

I wanted to talk about that even through years of painful and arduous recovery, I still found faith and hope in Jesus and my devoted family.

And finally, I wanted to finish by saying that a life of service in the Army and as a businessowner who provides support-services for wounded Veterans has prepared me to be a U.S. Senator.

Peter, my campaign is ONLY TWO DAYS OLD. Two days.

And how did 'Big Tech' welcome me to the political arena? Twitter censored a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform by labeling it "**sensitive content**."

[**Hey Twitter, was it my scars or the fact that I salute the flag?
